title: Account Support Optimized
label: Account Support Optimized
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Account, Access & Identity › Optimized Account Overview
titleNorm: account support optimized account support optimized
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity optimized account overview sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity optimized account overview
bodyNorm: english account support optimized use this page as the first triage checklist for account related cases when to use registration or login issues password recovery linked phone email issues account access or account security questions cases where the user cannot access the original login method required information before checking id registered phone email login method screenshot or screen recording of the error device model and app version when relevant whether the user still has access to the linked phone email cs decision flow confirm the id and issue type identify the current login method check whether the user has access to the linked phone email if the issue is caused by lost access follow the recovery or binding sop if ownership is unclear request verification evidence before escalation never disclose sensitive account information to an unverified requester escalation escalate only after the correct id and evidence are collected for suspicious ownership or security cases do not promise recovery before review customer reply template welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing to help us check your account issue accurately please provide your id the login method you used a screenshot of the error and let us know whether you still have access to the linked phone email once we receive the required information we will review the issue according to the account support procedure thank you العربيه account support optimized استخدم هذه

title: Payment Support Optimized
label: Payment Support Optimized
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Recharge, Payment & Privileges › Optimized Payment Overview
titleNorm: payment support optimized payment support optimized
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena recharge payment privileges optimized payment overview sugo knowledgebase mena recharge payment privileges optimized payment overview
bodyNorm: english payment support optimized use this page for recharge payment coins failed purchase or missing balance cases required information before checking id payment method order id transaction id payment amount and currency payment time and date screenshot of payment receipt screenshot of in app balance or error message cs decision flow confirm whether the payment was completed by the payment provider check if the coins balance were delivered in the app if paid but not delivered collect transaction proof and escalate if payment failed advise the user to retry after confirming payment method status if refund is requested follow the official refund policy and do not promise refund unless confirmed escalation missing coins after successful payment duplicate charge payment successful in bank provider but failed in app incorrect amount credited customer reply template welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing to help us check your payment issue please provide your id order transaction id payment amount payment time payment method and a screenshot of the payment receipt we will review the transaction after receiving the required details thank you العربيه payment support optimized استخدم هذه الصفحه لحالات الشحن، الدفع، العملات، فشل الشراء، او عدم وصول الرصيد المعلومات المطلوبه قبل الفحص رقم المستخدم id طريقه الدفع رقم الطلب او رقم العمليه مبلغ الدفع والعمله وقت وتاريخ الدفع لقطه شاشه من ايصال الدفع لقطه شاشه من الرصيد داخل التطبيق او رساله

bodyNorm: english game level requirement optimized use this page when users ask why a game feature is locked unavailable or requires a certain level required information before checking id game name current level screenshot of the lock error requirement device model and app version if the issue looks technical cs decision flow confirm the game or feature name check the required level or eligibility shown in the app compare it with the user s current level if the user meets the requirement but the feature remains locked collect screenshots and escalate if the user does not meet the requirement explain the requirement clearly customer reply template welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing please provide your id the game name your current level and a screenshot of the requirement or error message if you already meet the requirement and the game is still unavailable we will check it further thank you العربيه game level requirement optimized استخدم هذه الصفحه عندما يسال المستخدم عن سبب قفل لعبه او ميزه او حاجتها الي مستوي معين المعلومات المطلوبه قبل الفحص رقم المستخدم اسم اللعبه المستوي الحالي لقطه شاشه من القفل او الخطا او المتطلبات نوع الجهاز واصدار التطبيق اذا بدت المشكله تقنيه خطوات قرار خدمه العملاء تاكيد اسم اللعبه او الميزه مراجعه المستوي او شرط الاهليه الظاهر داخل التطبيق مقارنه الشرط بالمستوي الحالي للمستخدم اذا كان المستخدم مستوفيا للشرط وما زالت الميزه مقفله، يتم جمع لقطات الشاشه والتصعيد اذا لم يكن مستوفيا للشرط، يتم توضيح المتطلبات

bodyNorm: answer use this page as the operating hub for senior cs small sub agency cases start with the search box review the best match card then open the relevant sop before replying recommended workflow search using the user s issue keywords check best match and confidence open the sop source copy the customer facing ticket only when replying to the user use cs notes escalation internally only ticket welcome to the sugo family we are very happy and honored to have you with us how can we assist you today thank you for contacting sugo we are always happy to serve you we wish you a wonderful day sugo customer service team we will check your agency related request according to the relevant support procedure to help us review the case accurately please provide the required details such as agency id id screenshots and the related date or time period thank you for contacting sugo we are always happy to serve you we wish you a wonderful day sugo customer service team internal note decision flow identify the case type activation joining commission tasks rating activity rewards or backend access open the matching senior cs sop confirm required identifiers before escalation agency id agm id anchor id if applicable screenshots date range and issue description use sop only mode for sensitive policy questions escalate only after required checks are complete التذكره مرحبا، شكرا لتواصلك معنا سنقوم بمراجعه طلبك المتعلق بالوكاله وفق الاجراء المناسب في الدعم لمساعدتنا علي فحص الحاله بدقه، يرجي

bodyNorm: answer use these checklists before escalation or before giving a final answer agency verification delay agency id agm id verification submission date screenshot of pending status commission or revenue issue agency id date range screenshot of commission revenue page expected amount and actual amount rating record if relevant anchor joining rejection issue anchor id agency id application status screenshot rejection reason if visible whether face verification was completed transfer code request correct agm id agency id screenshot of missing transfer code or request page confirmation that the request is sent from the correct id activity reward issue activity name room id anchor id event time proof video including room id anchor id and last minute of stream ticket welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing to help us review your request accurately please provide the required details related to your case such as the relevant id screenshots date range and a clear description of the issue once we receive the complete information we will check and follow up accordingly thank you التذكره مرحبا، لمساعدتنا علي مراجعه طلبك بدقه، يرجي تزويدنا بالمعلومات المطلوبه المتعلقه بحالتك، مثل الرقم المرتبط بالحاله، لقطات الشاشه، الفتره الزمنيه، ووصف واضح للمشكله بعد استلام المعلومات كامله، سنقوم بالفحص والمتابعه وفق الاجراء المناسب شكرا لك ملاحظه داخليه استخدم هذه القوايم قبل التصعيد او قبل اعطاء رد نهايي تاخر التحقق من الوكاله رقم الوكاله رقم agm تاريخ

title: Backend Links Reference
label: Backend Links Reference
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Operations Command & References › Backend Systems & Reference Links
titleNorm: senior cs backend links reference backend links reference
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena operations command references backend systems reference links sugo knowledgebase mena operations command references backend systems reference links
bodyNorm: answer backend links appearing in the sop agm dashboard https union sugo com login used for agm dashboard access agency task monitoring host performance and agency reports agency backend union system https union voicemaker media login used in sop references for checking revenue and removing anchors from an agency important if there is a conflict between links use the currently approved internal link from management and do not promise access until the correct account permission is confirmed ticket welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing you can access the agm dashboard through the official dashboard link provided by the platform if you cannot login please contact customer support from the correct id so we can check your access or password reset request thank you الاجابه الروابط المذكوره داخل sop لوحه تحكم agm https union sugo com login تستخدم للدخول الي لوحه agm، متابعه مهام الوكاله، اداء المذيعات، وتقارير الوكاله نظام الوكالات الخلفي union system https union voicemaker media login ورد استخدامه في sop لمراجعه الايرادات وازاله المذيعات من الوكاله مهم اذا وجد تعارض بين الروابط، يتم استخدام الرابط الداخلي المعتمد حاليا من الاداره، ولا يتم تاكيد امكانيه الدخول قبل التحقق من صلاحيه الحساب الصحيحه التذكره مرحبا، يمكنك الدخول الي لوحه تحكم agm من خلال رابط لوحه التحكم الرسمي المعتمد من المنصه اذا لم تتمكن من تسجيل الدخول، يرجي التواصل مع خدمه العملاء من الحساب الصحيح حتي نتمكن من فحص صلاحيه الدخول او طلب اعاده تعيين كلمه المرور شكرا لك

bodyNorm: english agency activation agency activation requirements agent answer to activate an agency the agm must complete two requirements complete agency verification from me my agency if the agency is not verified an unverified agency banner will appear at the top of the page the agm must tap it and complete the verification process invite 5 eligible hosts from me my agency invite hosts eligible hosts must meet all requirements use a new device register with a new account must not have joined any other agency before must be female and over 18 years old important conditions agency verification will not be approved if the agm already owns another agency agency verification will not be approved if the agm has a female anchor account customer reply to activate your agency please complete the agency verification first from me my agency by tapping the unverified agency banner after verification please invite 5 eligible hosts each host must use a new device register with a new account must not have joined another agency before and must be female and over 18 years old agency verification review time agent answer agency verification is normally reviewed within 2 business days the senior monitor team handles this verification flow escalation mention if an agm complains that verification is still pending after the expected review period escalate to the responsible senior monitor contacts names mentioned in the source omar elsayed youssef ahmed mohamed ahmed waleed alaa the arabic source also

bodyNorm: english agency management eligible anchors for agency joining agent answer an anchor can join an agency only if all eligibility requirements are met new device new account has not joined any other agency before female and over 18 years old customer reply to join an agency the anchor must use a new device register with a new account must not have joined another agency before and must be female and over 18 years old anchor agency joining process agent answer an anchor can join through either an agm invitation or a self application self application path me my agency become an anchor fill in the required information upload verification photos wait for agm approval if the agm takes no action within 48 hours the request is auto approved after agm approval the system or official review team reviews the request within 24 hours customer reply you can join an agency through an invitation from the agm or you can apply from me my agency become an anchor after submitting the required information and verification photos the request waits for agm approval if no action is taken within 48 hours it may be approved automatically after that the official review is usually completed within 24 hours agency join request review time agent answer the joining request has two review stages agm review accept or reject within 48 hours if no action is taken the request is auto approved official review after agm approval the official review is completed within 24 hours pending agency applications agent

bodyNorm: english commission targets checking agency commission agent answer the agm can check agency revenue and commission from me my agency by tapping today s commission the agm can view details revenue can also be checked through https union voicemaker media login agency commission ratio agent answer the commission ratio depends on the daily agency rating level the rating is based on the total agency revenue during the past 30 days and includes total revenue of all hosts revenue of sub agencies when total revenue reaches the relevant level the agency receives the corresponding commission ratio the agm can check the current rating and ratio from my agency by tapping the icon in the top right corner important if the agency is level n but has not reached the basic target it will not receive commission commission qualification requirements agent answer the agm can check specific requirements from my agency icon cs internal qualification requirements same for main and sub agencies new agency within 30 calendar days of initial activation the agency must have at least 5 hosts established agency more than 5 active anchors total revenue over 200 000 diamonds active anchor definition an anchor who earns 20 000 diamonds within 30 days from chats and gifts commission settlement and payout time agent answer commission is settled daily and distributed at 00 00 agency commission calculation agent answer commission is calculated based on all anchors income and sub agencies income from the past 30

title: Agency Tasks

titleNorm: senior cs agency tasks agency tasks
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena operations command references commission tasks ratings sugo knowledgebase mena operations command references commission tasks ratings
bodyNorm: english agency tasks new agency tasks agent answer new agency tasks become available after agency activation the agency has 30 days from activation to complete them unlocking basic tasks if all new tasks are completed during the activation month basic tasks unlock on the 1st day of the next month if new tasks are not completed within 30 days basic tasks unlock on the 1st day of the following month example if the agency is activated on september 15 tasks completed by september 29 basic tasks unlock on october 1 tasks not completed by october 15 basic tasks unlock on november 1 invite anchors task countdown starts on the activation day new anchors must be invited within 30 days only anchors earning 20 000 diamonds within those 30 days count as valid effective anchors only anchors invited through the agm invite link or bound with the agm invite code qualify rewards are issued at midnight on the day requirements are met income task starts from the activation day the agency must reach the required income within 30 days sub agency income is excluded rewards are issued at midnight on the day requirements are met basic monthly agency tasks agent answer basic tasks are checked from my agency they reset every month on the 1st at midnight clearing progress and starting fresh invite agency task the invited agency must be activated rewards are issued at midnight on the day requirements are met invite anchors task only anchors earning 20 000 diamonds within 30 days of registration count

bodyNorm: english agency rating groups agency rating criteria agent answer agency rating criteria include a new valid anchors target the agency must meet all required targets to receive a specific rating the agm can check the targets inside the app new valid anchor definition the anchor joins the agency for the first time within 14 days of registration the anchor achieves 20 000 diamonds in revenue within 30 days of joining the agency main agency rating scope agent answer agency rating is based on the main agency only sub agency performance is not combined with the main agency for rating calculation growth reward eligibility agent answer growth rewards depend on the agency s star rating from the previous month if the agency was 0 star last month no growth reward will be issued even if the agency met the revenue growth target sub agency whatsapp group requirements agent answer a sub agency can have a whatsapp group if it met both conditions last month the sub agency reached the 2 star income requirement the sub agency had 10 new active anchors last month new active anchor definition for whatsapp group the host joins an agency for the first time within 14 days of registration the host reaches 40 000 income from chats and gifts within 30 days of joining the agency rating criteria has updated online with the target of new valid anchors an agency must meet all three targets to get a certain rating and the agm can check the targets in the app check the following chart for targets to unlock

bodyNorm: english backend system agm dashboard access agent answer the agm dashboard is an online management platform that allows agencies to monitor tasks host performance and agency reports in one place dashboard link https union sugo com login agm dashboard password reset agent answer if the agm forgot the dashboard password they should contact customer support to request a password reset cs procedure confirm the request is sent from the correct id advise the user to wait up to 24 hours send the reset request to the audition team responsible for agm password reset customer reply if you forgot your agm dashboard password please contact customer support from the correct id we will forward the reset request to the responsible team please allow up to 24 hours for processing agm transfer code request agent answer if the agm does not have a transfer code they should contact customer support to obtain one cs procedure confirm the request is sent from the correct id advise the user to wait up to 24 hours send the request in the acm group and mention charlotte to get a new transfer code customer reply if you do not have a transfer code please contact customer support from the correct id we will forward your request to the responsible team please allow up to 24 hours for processing contact customer support to reset your password sop for cs confirm the request is sent from the correct id and suggest the user wait for 24 hours sending the request to the audition team to reset the password

title: Account Sign-Up Guide
label: Account Sign-Up Guide
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Account, Access & Identity › Registration & Account Limits
titleNorm: account register signup account sign up guide
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity registration account limits sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity registration account limits
bodyNorm: english welcome to sugo we are excited to have you join our community follow these steps to create your account securely download the official app download the official sugo app from the google play store or apple app store avoid third party sources to ensure your security choose your registration method open the app and choose your preferred method phone email or social media account google apple facebook phone registration enter your number including the country code you will receive a 6 digit verification code by sms enter this code when prompted social media registration authorize the connection and grant the requested permissions this is a standard and safe process complete your profile after verification choose a unique username and upload a profile picture you can change these later at any time ready to explore once your profile is set your account is ready you can now explore sugo follow friends join rooms and enjoy all features we appreciate your trust in sugo have a wonderful experience it s simple just tap on any of the sign up options shown on your device to get started and create your account العربيه مرحبا بك في sugo نحن متحمسون لانضمامك الي مجتمعنا اتبع هذه الخطوات لانشاء حسابك بشكل امن تحميل التطبيق الرسمي حمل تطبيق sugo الرسمي من متجر google play او apple app store تجنب المصادر الاخري لضمان امانك اختيار طريقه التسجيل افتح التطبيق واختر الطريقه المفضله رقم الهاتف، البريد الالكتروني، او حساب التواصل الاجتماعي google، apple، facebook التسجيل برقم الهاتف ادخل

title: Account Registration Limits
label: Account Registration Limits
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Account, Access & Identity › Registration & Account Limits
titleNorm: account register limits account registration limits
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity registration account limits sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity registration account limits
bodyNorm: english thank you for your question about multiple accounts to maintain fairness and security for all users we have set reasonable limits account limit you may create up to five accounts using the same device or the same personal information this helps us prevent spam and abuse temporary block if you try to register more than five accounts from the same device our system may temporarily block new registrations from that device for up to 24 hours recommendation for the best experience we strongly recommend using one main account this helps you build genuine connections and track your progress easily bypassing limits attempting to bypass these limits using technical tricks may result in permanent suspension of all related accounts we once again sincerely apologize for the inconvenience we have caused and we truly thank you for your patience and understanding we wish you a happy and successful day sugo customer service team and cooperation these guidelines keep sugo safe for everyone you re welcome to try creating multiple accounts if needed however we don t recommend loging up for too many as you might hit a system limit for the best experience we suggest sticking to your main account thanks for your understanding and support العربيه شكرا لاستفسارك عن الحسابات المتعدده للحفاظ علي العداله والامان لجميع المستخدمين، وضعنا حدودا معقوله الحد الاقصي للحسابات يمكنك انشاء ما يصل الي خمسه حسابات باستخدام نفس الجهاز او نفس المعلومات الشخصيه هذا يساعدنا في منع البريد العشوايي واساءه

title: Account Login
label: Account Login
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Account, Access & Identity › Login, Password & Device Access
titleNorm: account login login account login
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity login password device access sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity login password device access
bodyNorm: english welcome back logging into your sugo account is quick and secure follow these instructions open the app open the sugo app and go to the login screen select your login method choose the same method you used when loging up phone email google apple facebook or another available option phone login enter your number with the country code then either enter your password or request an sms verification code third party login tap the corresponding icon and authorize the connection successful authentication after successful authentication you will be taken to your home feed where all features are available troubleshooting if you have trouble logging in check your internet connection and ensure your credentials are correct use the forgot password option if needed we are glad to see you again enjoy your time on sugo on the login page just pick the method tied to your account like google apple facebook or your phone then either authorize the third party account or enter your phone and password to login العربيه مرحبا بعودتك تسجيل الدخول الي حسابك في sugo سريع وامن اتبع هذه التعليمات فتح التطبيق افتح تطبيق sugo وانتقل الي شاشه تسجيل الدخول اختيار طريقه تسجيل الدخول اختر نفس الطريقه التي استخدمتها عند التسجيل رقم الهاتف، البريد الالكتروني، google، apple، facebook، او خيار اخر متاح تسجيل الدخول برقم الهاتف ادخل رقمك مع رمز الدوله ثم اما ان تدخل كلمه المرور او تطلب رمز تحقق عبر الرسايل النصيه تسجيل الدخول عبر طرف ثالث اضغط علي الايقونه المناسبه وفوض الاتصال المصادقه الناجحه بعد

title: Login Issues and Troubleshooting
label: Login Issues and Troubleshooting
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Account, Access & Identity › Login, Password & Device Access
titleNorm: account login issues login issues and troubleshooting
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity login password device access sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity login password device access
bodyNorm: english if you are unable to loginto your account follow these troubleshooting steps most login issues can be resolved quickly check error messages look for any error message on the login screen take a screenshot if possible as it helps identify the problem verify internet connection ensure your connection is stable try switching between wi fi and mobile data or restart your router confirm login method ensure you are using the correct method for example if you signed up with google do not try to login with your phone double check entered details verify that you have entered your phone or email correctly including the country code forgot password tap forgot password and follow the recovery steps app freezes or unresponsive close the app completely and reopen it you can also clear the app cache from your device settings reinstall the app if the problem persists uninstall and reinstall the app from the official store your account data will not be lost after trying these steps most login problems are resolved if you still cannot login please provide the error details and your id for further assistance please check if there s any message or alert when you try to login if you re still unsure what s going wrong after seeing the prompt feel free to send a screenshot or screen recording of the error to our customer support team we ll look into it and figure out what s causing the issue for you العربيه اذا لم تتمكن من تسجيل الدخول الي حسابك، فاتبع خطوات استكشاف الاخطاء هذه يمكن حل

title: Password Recovery
label: Password Recovery
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Account, Access & Identity › Login, Password & Device Access
titleNorm: account login recovery password recovery
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity login password device access sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity login password device access
bodyNorm: english if you have forgotten your password you can easily recover access to your account follow these steps access forgot password on the login screen tap forgot password choose registration method select the method you used when loging up phone or third party account phone recovery enter your number with the country code you will receive an sms with a 6 digit verification code enter this code then create a new password use a strong combination of letters numbers and symbols do not reuse passwords from other apps third party account recovery you will be redirected to that provider to reset your password there follow their instructions then return to sugo and login with that account after reset login with your new password keep it safe and do not share it with anyone if you do not receive the sms code refer to the sms verification not received section your account security is important to us thank you for taking these steps if you signed up using a third party account like apple google facebook line or tiktok please reach out to their customer support first to recover your account there once that s sorted you can use it to log back into our app if you used your phone no worries just request a verification code to reset your password you ll be back in no time العربيه اذا نسيت كلمه المرور، يمكنك استعاده الوصول الي حسابك بسهوله اتبع هذه الخطوات الوصول الي نسيت كلمه المرور علي شاشه تسجيل الدخول، اضغط علي نسيت كلمه المرور اختيار طريقه التسجيل اختر الطريقه التي استخدمتها عند

title: Linked Phone Number No Longer in Use
label: Linked Phone Number No Longer in Use
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Account, Access & Identity › Login, Password & Device Access
titleNorm: account login phone linked phone no longer in use
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity login password device access sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity login password device access
bodyNorm: english if the phone linked to your account is no longer active we can help you update it follow this process prepare required information your id id proof of ownership a recharge receipt a screenshot of your profile from a friend s account or an email from sugo to your registered email submit a change request through our official support channel request to change your linked phone include your old number if you remember it the new number you wish to link and the proof of ownership review process our verification team will review your request this typically takes 1 to 3 business days additional verification if needed in some cases we may ask for a photo of you holding a handwritten note with your id and the current date confirmation once your identity is confirmed we will update the linked number you will receive a confirmation message after the update you can use the new number for login and password recovery this process protects your account from being taken over by others thank you for your patience if the phone tied to your account isn t active anymore and you can t receive a verification code please reach out to our customer support team they ll guide you through the next steps to get this sorted out العربيه اذا كان رقم الهاتف المرتبط بحسابك لم يعد نشطا، فيمكننا مساعدتك في تحديثه اتبع هذه العمليه تجهيز المعلومات المطلوبه معرف حسابك id دليل علي الملكيه ايصال شحن، لقطه شاشه لملفك الشخصي من حساب صديق، او بريد الكتروني من sugo الي بريدك المسجل تقديم طلب التغيير من خلال

title: Multi-Device Access
label: Multi-Device Access
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Account, Access & Identity › Login, Password & Device Access
titleNorm: account login multidevice multi device access
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity login password device access sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity login password device access
bodyNorm: english sugo allows you to use your account on multiple devices but with important limitations for security please understand the following simultaneous logins not allowed you can loginto the same account on different devices but you cannot be logged in simultaneously on two devices logging in on a new device will automatically log you out of the previous one device account limit each device has a limit on how many different accounts can be used on it typically this is 3 to 5 accounts per device exceeding this may temporarily block logins from that device best practice for the best experience use your main account on a limited number of personal devices that you trust avoid logging in on public or shared devices proper logout if you frequently switch devices always log out properly from the previous device before logging in on the next one use the log out button in settings device limit reached if you see a message about reaching the device limit wait 24 hours or contact support to reset the devices associated with your account these limits protect your account from abuse we once again sincerely apologize for the inconvenience we have caused and we truly thank you for your patience and understanding we wish you a happy and successful day sugo customer service team yes you can loginto the same account on multiple devices but not at the same time just keep in mind that logging in on a new device will sign you out of the previous one also there s a limit to how many different

title: Available Login Methods
label: Available Login Methods
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Account, Access & Identity › Login, Password & Device Access
titleNorm: account login methods available login methods
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity login password device access sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity login password device access
bodyNorm: english sugo supports several login methods the options you see depend on your device s operating system and your region phone available globally on both android and ios you will receive an sms verification code each time you login or you can use a password if you have set one google available on android devices only not supported on ios due to apple s policies apple id available on ios devices iphone ipad only not supported on android facebook available on both android and ios line available in select regions where line is popular e g japan taiwan thailand tiktok available in select regions where tiktok integration is enabled if a login method is not visible on your screen it is not supported on your device or in your country at this time we are continuously working to add more options please use one of the visible methods to login all currently supported third party login options are displayed on the app s login screen if you don t see the method you re looking for it might mean it s not supported yet or isn t available on your device or region for example google login isn t available on ios devices and apple id login isn t an option on android we ll keep working to expand options so stay tuned العربيه يدعم sugo عده طرق لتسجيل الدخول الخيارات التي تراها تعتمد علي نظام تشغيل جهازك ومنطقتك رقم الهاتف متاح عالميا علي كل من android و ios ستتلقي رمز تحقق عبر الرسايل النصيه في كل مره تسجل فيها الدخول، او يمكنك استخدام كلمه مرور اذا كنت قد عينت واحده google متاح علي اجهزه android

title: SMS Verification Not Received
label: SMS Verification Not Received
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Account, Access & Identity › Security, SMS & Phone Binding
titleNorm: account security sms sms verification not received
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity security sms phone binding sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity security sms phone binding
bodyNorm: english if you do not receive the sms verification code please try the following steps most issues are resolved quickly confirm phone ensure you have entered the correct phone including the country code e g 20 for egypt 1 for usa daily limit you can request a code up to 5 times per day per account if you have exceeded this limit wait 24 hours before trying again check spam or junk folder sometimes the message is filtered there disable message blocking apps temporarily disable any third party apps that may intercept the code restart your phone this fixes temporary network glitches ensure you have a stable mobile signal free up sms inbox space if your inbox is full new messages may be rejected dual sim phones try swapping your primary sim card to the other slot recently reactivated line if you recently reactivated a suspended phone line allow up to 24 hours for full service restoration if you have tried all these steps and still do not receive the code please provide your id and phone for further assistance we re sorry you re having trouble receiving your sms code this can happen for several reasons please work through the following checklist step by step to find the solution check the basics daily limit correct number double check that you are entering the correct phone that is linked to your account daily limit please note that you can only request a code 5 times per day for a single account if you have exceeded this limit you must wait 24 hours before trying again check

title: Password Reset Guide
label: Password Reset Guide
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Account, Access & Identity › Security, SMS & Phone Binding
titleNorm: account security reset password reset guide
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity security sms phone binding sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity security sms phone binding
bodyNorm: english to reset your password follow these steps carefully access forgot password on the login screen tap forgot password choose registration method select the method you used when loging up phone or third party account phone reset enter your number with the country code and request an sms verification code enter the code when received you will then be allowed to create a new password choose a strong password at least 8 characters mix of letters numbers symbols third party account reset you will be redirected to that provider to reset your password follow their instructions then return to sugo and login after reset login with your new password keep it safe and do not share it with anyone if you do not receive the sms code refer to the sms verification not received section your password is now reset thank you for keeping your account secure to reset your password head to the me page swipe down and tap settings look for the account and safety section then go in and find edit account password you can update your password there by entering your old one if you ve forgotten your old password no problem just select forgot password and reset it using a verification code easy peasy العربيه لاعاده تعيين كلمه المرور، اتبع هذه الخطوات بعنايه الوصول الي نسيت كلمه المرور علي شاشه تسجيل الدخول، اضغط علي نسيت كلمه المرور اختيار طريقه التسجيل اختر الطريقه التي استخدمتها عند التسجيل رقم الهاتف او حساب طرف ثالث اعاده تعيين كلمه المرور برقم الهاتف ادخل رقمك مع رمز الدوله واطلب رمز تحقق عبر

bodyNorm: english linking your phone to your sugo account adds security and makes recovery easier follow these steps navigate to settings go to the me page then tap settings account and safety select account and safety then choose phone binding enter your number enter your phone including the country code tap the button to request a verification code verify you will receive a 6 digit code by sms enter this code when prompted confirmation once confirmed your phone is linked you can now use it for login and password recovery to change number repeat the same process the old number will be replaced automatically thank you for securing your account go to the me page swipe down and tap settings find the account and safety section then head in and select phone binding from there you can link your phone by entering a verification code sent to you if you need to update or change the linked number you can do that here too you re all set in just a few steps العربيه ربط رقم هاتفك بحسابك في sugo يضيف امانا ويسهل عمليه الاسترداد اتبع هذه الخطوات الانتقال الي الاعدادات انتقل الي صفحه انا ، ثم اضغط علي الاعدادات الحساب والامان اختر الحساب والامان ، ثم اضغط علي ربط الهاتف ادخل رقمك ادخل رقم هاتفك متضمنا رمز الدوله اضغط علي زر طلب رمز التحقق التحقق ستصلك رساله نصيه تحتوي علي رمز مكون من 6 ارقام ادخل هذا الرمز عندما يطلب منك التاكيد بعد التاكيد، يتم ربط رقم هاتفك يمكنك الان استخدامه لتسجيل الدخول واستعاده كلمه المرور لتغيير الرقم كرر نفس العمليه سيتم استبدال الرقم القديم تلقاييا شكرا لتامين حسابك اذهب

bodyNorm: english keeping your account secure is essential please follow these best practices strong password use a strong unique password that you do not share with anyone do not reuse passwords from other apps two factor authentication enable two factor authentication if available in your account settings verification codes never share your verification codes with anyone even if they claim to be sugo staff we will never ask for them review logged in devices regularly review the list of devices logged into your account go to settings and remove any device you do not recognize suspicious activity if you suspect unauthorized access to your account change your password immediately recovery information keep a valid phone and email address linked to your account for faster recovery lost access if you lose access provide your id and proof of ownership to our support team your security is our priority thank you for helping us keep sugo safe العربيه الحفاظ علي امان حسابك امر ضروري يرجي اتباع افضل الممارسات هذه كلمه مرور قويه استخدم كلمه مرور قويه وفريده لا تشاركها مع اي شخص لا تعيد استخدام كلمات مرور من تطبيقات اخري المصادقه الثناييه فعل المصادقه الثناييه اذا كانت متوفره في اعدادات حسابك رموز التحقق لا تشارك رموز التحقق الخاصه بك مع اي شخص ابدا، حتي لو ادعي انه موظف في sugo لن نطلبها منك ابدا مراجعه الاجهزه المسجله راجع بانتظام قايمه الاجهزه المسجله الدخول الي حسابك انتقل الي الاعدادات وازل اي جهاز لا تعرفه نشاط مشبوه اذا اشتبهت في وجود وصول غير مصرح به الي حسابك، فغير كلمه المرور فورا

bodyNorm: english changing your account gender is allowed only under specific conditions one time change gender can be changed only once and only for accounts that were created within the last few days typically within 7 days of registration accidental selection if you accidentally selected the wrong gender during sign up you may submit a request with your id to have it corrected permanent after grace period after the initial grace period gender becomes permanent and cannot be modified important notice your gender affects certain features such as messaging costs host applications and matching logic please choose carefully during registration exceptions if you believe an exception applies please provide a clear explanation and any supporting evidence we appreciate your understanding this policy helps maintain fairness and security on our platform you can only change your account gender in one specific case if you just created your account and accidentally selected the wrong gender this option is available only for newly created accounts so make sure to reach out to our customer support team right away with your id if this applies to you please note that you get only one chance to change it so use it wisely العربيه تغيير جنس حسابك مسموح به فقط في ظروف محدده تغيير لمره واحده يمكن تغيير الجنس مره واحده فقط، وفقط للحسابات التي تم انشاوها خلال الايام القليله الماضيه عاده خلال 7 ايام من التسجيل اختيار خاطي عن طريق الخطا اذا اخترت الجنس الخاطي عن طريق الخطا اثناء التسجيل، فيمكنك تقديم طلب مع

bodyNorm: english your account country is usually set automatically when you sign up based on your phone and ip address changing it requires a formal request request form to request a country change fill out the official country change request form available through our support channels valid reason you must provide a valid reason for the change e g you have permanently moved to another country proof of residency attach proof of residency or relocation such as a utility bill visa or official government document effect of change changing your country may affect coin prices available payment methods and access to region specific events your existing balances will be adjusted fairly review time the review process takes a few business days once approved your account country will be updated frequent or fraudulent requests frequent or fraudulent change requests may be denied we once again sincerely apologize for the inconvenience we have caused and we truly thank you for your patience and understanding we wish you a happy and successful day sugo customer service team we want to ensure your account reflects your correct location changing your account s country requires a formal request to ensure your account remains secure to begin the process please follow these steps fill out and submit our official country change request form you can access it here https micoworld feishu cn share base form shrcnkjhwoj7krb5tt3ydkobz6f when filling out the form please double check that you have entered your

title: Distance Visibility Settings
label: Distance Visibility Settings

titleNorm: account profile distance distance visibility settings
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity profile location privacy sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity profile location privacy
bodyNorm: english you can control whether other users see your approximate distance on your profile based on location permissions your distance is based on your device s location permissions to hide your distance go to your phone s system settings find the sugo app and turn off location permissions important caching note due to system caching your last known location may remain visible for up to 30 days after you disable permissions after that it will be hidden automatically to show your distance again simply turn location permissions back on the distance will appear immediately hiding your distance does not affect other features like messaging or room access you are in control of your privacy adjust these settings as you prefer you can hide your distance from other users by turning off the app s permission to access your location in your phone s settings to do this go to your phone s main settings find the apps or privacy section locate the sugo app and disable its location permissions important note 30 day cache please be aware that for performance reasons our system caches your last known location this means that after you turn off location permissions your old distance will continue to be visible on your profile for up to 30 days after this 30 day period your distance will be hidden automatically العربيه يمكنك التحكم في ما اذا كان المستخدمون الاخرون يرون مسافتك التقريبيه علي ملفك الشخصي تعتمد علي اذونات الموقع تعتمد مسافتك علي اذونات موقع جهازك لاخفاء مسافتك اذهب الي اعدادات

title: Account Ban Reasons
label: Account Ban Reasons
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Account, Access & Identity › Ban, Appeal & Account Deletion
titleNorm: account ban reasons account ban reasons
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity ban appeal account deletion sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity ban appeal account deletion
bodyNorm: english accounts may be banned for violating our community guidelines below are the most common reasons inappropriate content posting nudity violence hate speech harassment or bullying fraud and spam engaging in spam fraudulent behavior or attempting to scam other users cheating and unauthorized tools using unauthorized third party tools modified versions of the app or cheating in games impersonation impersonating another person a celebrity a brand or an official sugo staff member repeated rule violations repeatedly breaking room or chat rules after receiving warnings ban evasion creating multiple accounts to bypass bans or other restrictions bans can be temporary from a few hours to several months or permanent depending on the severity and frequency of violations if your account is banned you will receive a notification explaining the reason and duration we encourage all users to read and follow our community guidelines which are available in the app settings respectful behavior keeps sugo a safe and enjoyable place for everyone if your account has been banned it s likely due to a violation of our community guidelines like posting inappropriate content harassing others or breaking app rules you can check our community guidelines through settings about sugo community guidelines for reference to get more details check for any notification or message from sugo team explaining the reason if you re still unsure or need help feel free to reach out to our customer support team

bodyNorm: english if your account has been banned and you believe it was a mistake or if you have taken steps to correct the violation you may submit an appeal read the ban notification it will state whether the ban is temporary or permanent temporary ban no action is required simply wait for the specified period to pass your account will be automatically restored permanent ban you may submit an appeal provide your id and a clear honest explanation of why you believe the ban should be lifted include any supporting evidence such as screenshots or context that may help us understand your situation review process appeals are reviewed in the order they are received this process may take several business days one appeal only please submit only one appeal multiple appeals will not speed up the process and may be ignored outcome if your appeal is approved your account will be restored if it is denied the ban remains in place we take bans seriously and only issue them after careful review we also believe in giving users a chance to explain their side thank you for your honesty if your account is blocked it s usually tied to a violation of our community guidelines first check any notification sugo team sent for details on the ban and whether it s temporary or permanent if it s temporary you ll just need to wait out the duration for permanent bans or if you think it s a mistake you can appeal by contacting our customer support team provide your id and a brief explanation and we ll review your

bodyNorm: english deleting your sugo account is a permanent and irreversible action please read carefully before proceeding navigate to delete account go to the me page then tap settings select account and safety then scroll down and tap delete account warning you will see a warning explaining that all your data will be permanently erased coins diamonds friends messages moments and all other information confirmation confirm your decision after confirmation you must not loginto your account for 7 days if you login during the 7 days the deletion request will be automatically canceled and your account will remain active permanent deletion after 7 days with no login your account will be permanently deleted from our system no one can recover it subscriptions deleting your account does not cancel any active subscriptions you may have purchased through the app store you must cancel those separately unsure if you are unsure consider logging out or taking a break instead of deleting we would hate to lose you we respect your decision thank you for being part of sugo to delete your account go to the me page tap settings then select account and safety and choose delete account please note once you confirm the deletion avoid logging in for 7 days logging in during this time will cancel the request and you ll need to start the process again be aware that deleting your account is permanent and all data will be erased with no way to recover it if you re unhappy with any app features or have

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing thank you for choosing to recharge on sugo adding coins to your account is quick and easy please follow these steps go to the me page at the bottom right of the app tap recharge you will see a list of coin packages with different amounts and prices choose the package you wish to purchase select your preferred payment method available methods depend on your region and device credit card google play apple app store etc complete the payment through your app store or payment provider follow the on screen instructions once the payment is successful the coins will be added to your account instantly you can check your new balance on the me page please note the currency displayed is based on the region of your apple id or google play account to change currency update your store region thank you for supporting sugo enjoy your coins best regards sugo support team go to the me page at the bottom right of the app and tap recharge you ll see the available recharge options and prices pick the coin amount you d like to add complete the payment and you re good to go just a heads up the currency shown depends on the region set for your apple id or google play account if you d rather pay in a different currency you ll need to switch the region of your apple or google account first العربيه مرحبا، شكرا لاختيارك الشحن علي sugo اضافه العملات الي حسابك سريعه وسهله يرجي اتباع هذه الخطوات انتقل الي صفحه انا

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing we want to assure you about your payment security please understand the following sugo does not store your credit card or payment details on our servers your payment information is handled entirely by your app store google play or apple app store when you make a purchase the transaction is processed by google or apple not by sugo to remove saved payment details you need to manage them through your google account or apple id settings not within sugo for google go to payments google com or your google play settings to remove saved cards for apple go to settings your name payment shipping from there you can remove or update your payment methods no payment information is stored inside the sugo app itself your financial security is our priority if you have further questions please refer to google or apple support best regards sugo support team your financial security is our top priority to be clear we do not save store or have access to any of your credit card or payment information when you make a purchase the transaction is handled entirely by the secure payment system of your device s app store either the apple app store or google play store our app simply provides a secure gateway to that service because your payment details are linked to your apple id or google account not your sugo account there is no card information stored within our app to remove or unbind if you wish to manage

label: Recharge Failure Issues

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing we understand that a failed recharge can be frustrating please check the following common causes and solutions insufficient balance or bank restrictions your card may have insufficient funds or your bank may have blocked the transaction for security reasons contact your bank or try another card daily or monthly limit reached some payment methods have limits e g 50 per day 500 per month wait until the next day or next month or use a different method payment method not supported not all cards or payment methods work in all regions try a different card or method e g google play balance apple id balance app store issues if you are using google play or apple app store ensure you are logged into the correct account and that your store region matches your payment method device or network issues restart your device switch networks or clear the app cache account restrictions in rare cases your account may have a payment restriction due to security reasons if you have tried everything provide the error screenshot and your id for further investigation most recharge failures are temporary thank you for your patience best regards sugo support team we re sorry you re having trouble recharging when a payment fails the app usually displays an error message this message is the best clue to understanding the problem if you see an error please take a screenshot if the advice below doesn t solve it you

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you have successfully completed a recharge but the coins have not appeared in your account please follow these steps first log out of your account and log back in often this refreshes your balance and the coins appear check your coin history go to me recharge record icon top right see if the transaction is listed there for google play purchases provide a screenshot of your google receipt sent to your gmail also upload app log from me settings about sugo upload app log for apple app store purchases provide a screenshot of the apple receipt sent to your apple id email for credit card purchases provide a screenshot of the bank sms confirmation or the exact amount time and last 4 digits of your card for purchases through third party sellers seagame topup live etc contact them directly as they handle their own transactions once we confirm the payment was successful we will add the missing coins to your account thank you for your patience we will resolve this for you promptly best regards sugo support team we re sorry for the trouble and want to get this sorted out for you right away first please try this quick fix log out of your account close the app completely make sure it s not running in the background and then log back in this often resolves the issue and your coins will appear if your coins are still missing the next steps depend on your payment method please find the method you

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you notice that your vip points store points have decreased without an obvious reason here is the explanation vip points are valid for 90 days from the date they are earned when you redeem items from the point store the system automatically uses the points that are closest to expiring first therefore a deduction may simply mean that some of your points expired or were used for a redemption to check your points history go to me vip tap the record icon top right you will see all additions redemptions and expirations no points are ever deducted without a valid reason understanding this policy will help you keep track of your points best regards sugo support team don t worry let s check it out go to the me page at the bottom right of the app tap vip and click the record icon in the top right corner to view your points history your vip points are valid for 90 days and when you redeem items from the point store the system uses the points closest to expiring first this might explain the deduction take a look at your record to see the details العربيه مرحبا، اذا لاحظت ان نقاط vip الخاصه بك نقاط المتجر قد انخفضت بدون سبب واضح، فاليك التفسير نقاط vip صالحه لمده 90 يوما من تاريخ كسبها عند استبدال عناصر من متجر النقاط، يستخدم النظام تلقاييا النقاط الاقرب الي انتهاء الصلاحيه اولا لذلك، قد يعني الخصم ببساطه ان بعض نقاطك انتهت صلاحيتها او تم استخدامها للاستبدال للتحقق من سجل نقاطك انتقل الي انا

title: SVIP Level Degradation
label: SVIP Level Degradation
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Recharge, Payment & Privileges › SVIP Levels, Points & Elite Club
titleNorm: payment svip degradation svip level degradation
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena recharge payment privileges svip levels points elite club sugo knowledgebase mena recharge payment privileges svip levels points elite club
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing svip levels are not permanent they are based on your recharge activity over the last 30 days here is how degradation works each svip level lasts for 30 days if you meet the required exp threshold within that period you maintain or upgrade your level if you do not maintain the required exp for your current level 50 of your exp from the current cycle carries over to the next but capped at 95 of the exp needed to keep your current level example if you need 12 920 000 exp to maintain svip2 and you have 28 000 000 exp you keep svip2 but do not upgrade next cycle you carry over 12 274 000 95 of 12 920 000 if you fail to maintain svip1 you lose svip status entirely and your exp resets to zero if you do not accumulate enough for your current level you drop by one level check the svip center regularly to track your progress and avoid unexpected degradation best regards sugo support team each svip level lasts for 30 days if your svip experience 1 coin 1 exp hits the threshold for a higher level within that time you ll upgrade instantly and the 30 day period refreshes in real time svip also lets you jump levels if you meet the criteria if you don t maintain or upgrade your level 50 of the experience from the current cycle carries over to the next but it can t exceed 95 of the experience needed to keep your current level for example if you re at svip2 needing 12 920 000 exp to maintain with 28

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing svip has 7 levels each level requires a certain amount of recharge exp 1 coin 1 exp within a rolling 30 day window the exact thresholds are displayed in the svip center me svip they may be updated from time to time higher levels require significantly more coins for example svip7 requires millions of coins recharged in 30 days to maintain your level you must meet the required exp each 30 day cycle if you fall below you will degrade as explained in the previous section to upgrade to a higher level you need to exceed the threshold for that level within the same 30 day period check the svip center regularly to see your current progress and the requirements for the next level best regards sugo support team this shows the exp coins needed to advance to the next level this is the exp coins you need to earn in a 30 day period to keep your level if you fall short your svip level will downgrade العربيه مرحبا، لدي svip 7 مستويات يتطلب كل مستوي قدرا معينا من خبره الشحن 1 عمله 1 خبره خلال نافذه 30 يوما متجدده العتبات الدقيقه معروضه في مركز svip انا svip قد يتم تحديثها من وقت لاخر المستويات الاعلي تتطلب عملات اكثر بكثير علي سبيل المثال، يتطلب svip7 ملايين العملات المشحونه في 30 يوما للحفاظ علي مستواك، يجب ان تفي بالخبره المطلوبه كل دوره 30 يوما اذا انخفضت عن ذلك، فسوف تنخفض كما هو موضح في القسم السابق للترقيه الي مستوي اعلي، تحتاج الي تجاوز عتبه ذلك المستوي خلال نفس فتره ال 30 يوما تحقق من مركز

path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Recharge, Payment & Privileges › SVIP Levels, Points & Elite Club
titleNorm: payment svip unexpected deduction unexpected svip points deduction
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena recharge payment privileges svip levels points elite club sugo knowledgebase mena recharge payment privileges svip levels points elite club
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you notice a deduction in your svip points it is most likely due to the expiration of points svip points are valid for 90 days points older than 90 days expire automatically when you redeem items from the point store the system uses points closest to expiration first this can also cause a deduction to see your full points history go to me svip tap the record icon top right you will see all additions redemptions and expirations no points are deducted without a valid reason regularly check your point balance and expiration dates to avoid surprises best regards sugo support team don t worry let s check it out go to the me page at the bottom right of the app tap svip and click the record icon in the top right corner to view your points history your svip points are valid for 90 days and when you redeem items from the point store the system uses the points closest to expiring first this might explain the deduction take a look at your record to see the details العربيه مرحبا، اذا لاحظت خصما في نقاط svip الخاصه بك، فمن المرجح انه بسبب انتهاء صلاحيه النقاط نقاط svip صالحه لمده 90 يوما النقاط التي يزيد عمرها عن 90 يوما تنتهي صلاحيتها تلقاييا عند استبدال عناصر من متجر النقاط، يستخدم النظام النقاط الاقرب الي انتهاء الصلاحيه اولا يمكن ان يتسبب هذا ايضا في خصم لرويه سجل نقاطك الكامل، انتقل الي انا svip اضغط علي ايقونه سجل اعلي اليمين ستري جميع الاضافات والاستبدالات وانتهاء الصلاحيه لا يتم خصم اي

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing a dynamic animated nickname makes your name stand out with moving effects here is how to get one go to me vip svip center svip store look for the dynamic nickname item it is available for exchange using svip points the cost in svip points varies depending on the design and duration once you redeem it your nickname will become animated according to the selected style dynamic nicknames are visible to all users on your profile in chats and in rooms this is an exclusive privilege for svip members enjoy making your name shine best regards sugo support team to grab a dynamic nickname head to the me page go to the vip svip center and then visit the svip store there you can exchange your svip points for a cool dynamic nickname check it out and level up your style العربيه مرحبا، الاسم المستعار الديناميكي المتحرك يجعل اسمك مميزا بتاثيرات حركيه اليك كيفيه الحصول عليه انتقل الي انا مركز vip svip متجر svip ابحث عن عنصر الاسم المستعار الديناميكي انه متاح للاستبدال باستخدام نقاط svip تختلف تكلفه نقاط svip حسب التصميم والمده بمجرد استبداله، سيصبح اسمك المستعار متحركا وفقا للاسلوب المختار الاسماء المستعاره الديناميكيه مرييه لجميع المستخدمين علي ملفك الشخصي وفي الدردشات والغرف هذا امتياز حصري لاعضاء svip استمتع بجعل اسمك يلمع مع اطيب التحيات، فريق دعم sugo للحصول علي لقب ديناميكي، انتقل الي صفحه صفحتي ثم الي مركز vip svip ، وبعدها ادخل الي متجر svip من هناك، يمكنك استبدال نقاط svip الخاصه بك للحصول

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing the elite club is an exclusive membership for top rechargers here is how to qualify and join qualification recharge a total of 1 500 usd or more within a single calendar month from the 1st to the last day of the month activation your membership will be automatically activated on the 1st day of the month following the month you qualified example if you recharge 1 500 between august 1 and august 31 your elite club membership starts on september 1 benefits elite club members receive special rewards exclusive gifts and priority support duration membership lasts for the entire calendar month to maintain it you need to qualify again the next month there is no separate application our system automatically tracks your recharges and grants membership when you meet the threshold thank you for your high status best regards sugo support team joining the elite club is your ticket to exclusive rewards and status on our platform we re excited you re interested in becoming a member to qualify for the elite club you must recharge a total of 1 500 usd or more within a single calendar month from the 1st to the last day when does my membership start your elite club membership will be automatically be activated on the 1st day of the month following the month you qualified for example if you recharge a total of 1 500 between august 1st and august 31st your membership will begin on september 1st we look

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing yes recharges made through official offline channels certified coin sellers count fully toward your vip svip and elite club progress the key requirement is that the transaction must be through an official verified seller with the official badge offline recharges are treated exactly the same as in app recharges for the purpose of exp points and qualification to ensure your progress is counted always use the official offline recharge tab in the app and only transact with sellers who have the verified badge recharges from unofficial sellers will not count and may put your account at risk thank you for using official channels your security and progress are our priority best regards sugo support team recharges made through any of our official recharge channels are fully counted towards your progress for all of our elite programs including vip svip and the elite club the important factor is that the transaction is made through a certified partner to ensure your payments contribute to your status and that your account remains secure we strongly recommend only using recharge channels that are officially recognized by us العربيه مرحبا، نعم، عمليات الشحن التي تتم عبر القنوات الخارجيه الرسميه بايعي العملات المعتمدين تحتسب بالكامل ضمن تقدمك في vip و svip ونادي النخبه الشرط الاساسي هو ان تكون المعامله من خلال بايع رسمي موثق يملك الشاره الرسميه يتم التعامل مع عمليات الشحن الخارجيه بنفس الطريقه

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing aristocracy is a special identity class on sugo that comes with exclusive rights and privileges the higher your aristocrat level the more perks you enjoy how to acquire purchase an aristocracy package from the aristocracy page me aristocracy packages are available at different levels e g viscount count duke etc duration each package lasts for a specific period usually 30 days you can purchase multiple levels but only the highest level is active during the same period important note as of july 14 2025 new aristocracy activations no longer include daily free coins existing users who activated before this date continue to receive daily coins until their current tier expires benefits aristocracy members get features like invisible room entry incognito profile visits online invisibility and more check your status go to my aristocracy to see active tiers and expiration dates choose the level that suits your needs thank you for supporting sugo best regards sugo support team aristocracy is a special identity class in sugo that comes with exclusive rights and privileges the higher your aristocrat level the more perks you ll enjoy to become an aristocrat you can purchase it through the aristocracy page you can activate multiple aristocracy levels at once but only the highest level will be recognized during the same period a quick heads up on gifting starting july 14 2025 inclusive all

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing to equip or change a frame fantasy car or entrance vehicle that you already own follow these simple steps go to the me page and tap backpack browse through your items you will see tabs for frames vehicles and other decorations tap on the item you wish to equip a pop up window will appear with an equip button tap it the item will be applied immediately for vehicles the entrance effect will activate when you enter a room to change to another item simply repeat the process and equip a different one the old item will be unequipped automatically you can equip one frame and one vehicle at a time some items have expiration dates after they expire they will be removed from your equipped items enjoy personalizing your sugo experience best regards sugo support team head to the me page at the bottom right of the app tap backpack to see all the items you own pick the one you want to use tap to equip it boom you ve switched it up successfully العربيه مرحبا، لتجهيز او تغيير اطار او سياره خياليه او مركبه دخول تمتلكها بالفعل، اتبع هذه الخطوات البسيطه انتقل الي صفحه انا واضغط علي حقيبه الظهر تصفح عناصرك ستري علامات تبويب للاطارات والمركبات والديكورات الاخري اضغط علي العنصر الذي ترغب في تجهيزه ستظهر نافذه منبثقه تحتوي علي زر تجهيز اضغط عليه سيتم تطبيق العنصر فورا بالنسبه للمركبات، سيتفعل تاثير الدخول عند دخولك الي غرفه للتغيير الي عنصر اخر، ما عليك سوي تكرار العمليه وتجهيز عنصر مختلف سيتم الغاء تجهيز

titleNorm: payment decoration entry effect entry effect not visible after equipping
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena recharge payment privileges decoration frames entry effects sugo knowledgebase mena recharge payment privileges decoration frames entry effects
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you have equipped an entrance vehicle but do not see the entry effect when you enter a room please check the following make sure you have actually equipped the vehicle go to your backpack and confirm that the vehicle shows as equipped in any room tap the expand menu button bottom right corner to reveal more options select special effect settings ensure that vehicle effects or entry effects is turned on if it is off your entry effect will not play if the setting is on and you still see no effect try closing and reopening the app if the problem persists record a short video showing the issue then go to me settings about sugo upload app log after uploading send the video for troubleshooting most often the issue is simply that the effect setting is disabled enable it and enjoy your grand entrance best regards sugo support team to check this enter any room and tap the expand menu button in the bottom right corner to reveal more options look for special effect settings and make sure your vehicle effects are turned on if they re enabled but you still don t see any animation please record a short video of the issue then go to the me page tap settings find about sugo and select upload app log send the video and details to our customer support team and we ll help you troubleshoot and fix it العربيه مرحبا، اذا كنت قد جهزت مركبه دخول ولكنك لا تري تاثير الدخول عند دخولك الي غرفه، فيرجي التحقق

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing thank you for reaching out finding and connecting with your real life friends on sugo is easy please follow these steps ask your friend for their sugo id id they can find it on their profile page on the app s home screen tap the search icon in the top right corner magnifying glass enter your friend s id in the search field and tap search if the account exists and is in the same region as you their profile will appear tap follow or add friend to send a request once they accept you can chat you can also invite friends who are not yet on sugo by sharing the app download link via other messaging apps enjoy staying connected with your real life circle on sugo best regards sugo support team you can invite your real life friends to join sugo if they re already on the app just tap the search button in the top right corner of the app s home screen enter their id and hit search from there you can send them a friend request to connect العربيه مرحبا، شكرا لتواصلك البحث عن اصدقايك في الحياه الواقعيه والتواصل معهم علي sugo سهل يرجي اتباع هذه الخطوات اطلب من صديقك معرف حساب sugo الخاص به id يمكنه العثور عليه في صفحه ملفه الشخصي علي الشاشه الرييسيه للتطبيق، اضغط علي ايقونه البحث في الزاويه العلويه اليمني العدسه المكبره ادخل معرف حساب صديقك في حقل البحث واضغط علي بحث اذا كان الحساب موجودا وفي نفس منطقتك، سيظهر ملفه الشخصي اضغط علي متابعه او اضافه صديق لارسال طلب بمجرد قبوله، يمكنك الدردشه يمكنك ايضا

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you search for a user by their id and cannot find them here are the most common reasons and solutions cross region search is not supported you can only find users who are in the same geographical region as you our platform is divided into regional communities account is inactive or banned if the user has not logged in for a long time or their account has been banned they will not appear in search results account is under risk control some accounts with suspicious activity may be temporarily hidden from search incorrect id double check the id with your friend a single digit or letter difference will result in not found if you believe the account should exist and is in your region ask your friend to verify their id from their profile page if they are active and still not found they may have privacy settings that hide them from search best regards sugo support team if you are searching for a user s id and cannot find them there are two common reasons for this cross region search our search feature is currently region specific to help build stronger local communities this means you can only search for and find users who are in the same geographical region as you account status you cannot search for accounts that are inactive risk controlled status or have been banned these profiles are hidden from search results to maintain a safe and active environment on the platform please make
