bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing your id also called id is a unique number that identifies your account here is how to find it go to the me page at the bottom right of the app tap on your avatar profile picture to go to your full profile page your id is displayed right below your album photo gallery it is usually a number like 12345678 you can tap on the id to copy it to your clipboard then paste it anywhere to share with friends or support please keep your id safe it is needed for account recovery and support requests you can also find your id in the settings page in some app versions but the profile page is the most reliable best regards sugo support team tap your avatar on the me page to visit your profile it ll be right below your album العربيه مرحبا، معرف حسابك يسمي ايضا id هو رقم فريد يعرف حسابك اليك كيفيه العثور عليه انتقل الي صفحه انا اسفل يمين التطبيق اضغط علي صورتك الرمزيه الصوره الشخصيه للذهاب الي صفحه ملفك الشخصي الكامله يظهر معرف حسابك مباشره اسفل البوم الصور يكون عاده رقما مثل 12345678 يمكنك الضغط علي المعرف لنسخه الي الحافظه، ثم لصقه في اي مكان لمشاركته مع الاصدقاء او الدعم يرجي الاحتفاظ بمعرف حسابك بامان انه ضروري لاسترداد الحساب وطلبات الدعم يمكنك ايضا العثور علي معرفك في صفحه الاعدادات في بعض اصدارات التطبيق، لكن صفحه الملف الشخصي هي الاكثر موثوقيه مع اطيب التحيات، فريق دعم sugo اضغط علي صورتك الرمزيه في صفحه انا للذهاب الي ملفك الشخصي ستجد معرف حسابك مباشره اسفل البوم الصور

title: Coins Deducted for Messages
label: Coins Deducted for Messages
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Social, Moments & Community › Messaging, Chat Costs & Chat Tools
titleNorm: function social coins deducted messages coins deducted for messages
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community messaging chat costs chat tools sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community messaging chat costs chat tools
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you are a male user and you send a message to a female user whom you do not mutually follow coins will be deducted here is how it works cost the female user sets her message price default 160 coins can be 200 or 240 you pay that amount per message refund if the female user does not reply to your message within 12 hours the coins will be automatically returned to your account mutual follow once you and the female user follow each other mutual follow messaging becomes free no coins are deducted check if unfollowed if you notice deductions after you thought you were mutual followers the other person may have temporarily unfollowed you no bugs there are no known bugs with this system the deduction logic is consistent to avoid coin deductions build mutual follow relationships with the users you chat with frequently best regards sugo support team if you re a male user sending messages to a female user you don t mutually follow it ll cost you some coins but don t worry if the female user doesn t reply to your message for more than 12 hours the coins will be returned to your account and once you re mutual followers with someone messaging won t deduct coins just a heads up there are no bugs with mutual follow status on our app if you notice coins being deducted after following each other it might be worth checking if the other person has temporarily unfollowed you العربيه مرحبا، اذا كنت

title: Varying Coin Costs for Chat Messages
label: Varying Coin Costs for Chat Messages
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Social, Moments & Community › Messaging, Chat Costs & Chat Tools
titleNorm: function social varying coin costs varying coin costs for chat messages
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community messaging chat costs chat tools sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community messaging chat costs chat tools
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing the cost of sending a message to a female user may vary from one user to another here is why female users can set their own message price the default is 160 coins per message as a female user s charm level increases she unlocks the ability to set higher prices 200 or 240 coins per message therefore if you message different female users you may pay different amounts depending on their individual settings the price is displayed before you send the message usually next to the send button or in the chat settings if you find the price too high you can choose not to message that user or try to become mutual followers which makes messaging free this system allows female users to manage their inbox and rewards higher charm levels we once again sincerely apologize for the inconvenience we have caused and we truly thank you for your patience and understanding we wish you a happy and successful day sugo customer service team best regards sugo support team female users can set the coin price for replying to messages so the number of coins deducted when male users send messages may differ depending on the recipient that s why you might see some variation the default price is 160 coins per message but female users can also set the price to 200 or 240 coins العربيه مرحبا، قد تختلف تكلفه ارسال رساله الي مستخدمه انثي من مستخدمه الي اخري اليك السبب يمكن للمستخدمات الاناث تحديد سعر رسالتهم بانفسهن

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing you can chat for free when both you and the other user follow each other this is called mutual follow once you are mutual followers all text messages between you and that user are completely free no coins are deducted to become mutual followers each of you needs to tap the follow button on the other s profile voice calls however always require coins even if you are mutual followers only text messages are free if you stop following each other the free chat privilege ends and messages will cost coins again mutual follow is the best way to enjoy unlimited conversations without worrying about your coin balance best regards sugo support team you can chat for free when both you and the other user follow each other once you become mutual followers your text conversations will be completely free this is the best way to enjoy unlimited chats with the people you connect with the most please note that voice calls will still require coins even if you are mutual followers العربيه مرحبا، يمكنك الدردشه مجانا عندما تتابع انت والمستخدم الاخر بعضكما البعض هذا يسمي المتابعه المتبادله بمجرد ان تكونا متابعين متبادلين، تكون جميع الرسايل النصيه بينك وبين ذلك المستخدم مجانيه تماما لا يتم خصم اي عملات لتصبحا متابعين متبادلين، يجب علي كل منكما الضغط علي زر متابعه في ملف الاخر ومع ذلك، تتطلب المكالمات الصوتيه عملات دايما حتي لو كنتما متابعين متبادلين فقط الرسايل النصيه هي المجانيه اذا توقفتما عن متابعه بعضكما

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing to follow another user tap on their avatar to visit their profile page then tap the follow button daily follow limit you can follow up to 80 users per day this limit does not apply to users with vip level 7 or higher or charm level 7 or higher if you have been very active and reached this limit you will not be able to follow more people until the next day following someone allows you to see their moments sends them a notification and is the first step toward mutual follow there is no limit to how many followers you can have only how many accounts you can follow to encourage meaningful connections the follow limit helps prevent spam thank you for building genuine relationships on sugo best regards sugo support team to follow another user simply tap their avatar to visit their profile page then tap the follow button to encourage meaningful connections there is a daily follow limit of 80 users except for users vip level 7 or charm level 7 if you have been very active and reached this limit you will not be able to follow more people until the next day please wait until tomorrow to continue connecting with other users العربيه مرحبا، لمتابعه مستخدم اخر، اضغط علي صورته الرمزيه للذهاب الي صفحته الشخصيه، ثم اضغط علي زر متابعه الحد اليومي للمتابعه يمكنك متابعه ما يصل الي 80 مستخدما في اليوم لا ينطبق هذا الحد علي المستخدمين بمستوي vip 7 او اعلي، او مستوي جاذبيه 7 او اعلي اذا كنت نشيطا جدا ووصلت

title: Cannot Follow More Users
label: Cannot Follow More Users
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Social, Moments & Community › Following, Blocking & Reporting
titleNorm: function social cannot follow more cannot follow more users
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community following blocking reporting sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community following blocking reporting
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you receive a message that you cannot follow more users you have reached the maximum number of accounts you are allowed to follow standard users can follow up to 300 accounts vip users have higher limits vip1 up to 1 000 vip5 up to 1 500 vip7 up to 2 000 if you have reached your limit you will need to unfollow some accounts before you can follow new ones to unfollow go to the user s profile tap the menu and select unfollow upgrading to a higher vip level increases your follow limit significantly following too many accounts can make your feed crowded we recommend following only those you truly interact with thank you for managing your follow list responsibly best regards sugo support team if you re having trouble following a new account it s likely because you ve reached the maximum following limit for your account type to ensure a great experience for everyone on the platform we have the following limits vip users have a significantly higher limit which increases with your vip level vip level 1 up to 1 000 accounts vip level 5 up to 1 500 accounts vip level 7 up to 2 000 accounts if you have reached your limit you will need to unfollow some other accounts before you can follow new ones upgrading to a vip membership is a great way to increase your limit العربيه مرحبا، اذا تلقيت رساله تفيد بانك لا تستطيع متابعه المزيد من المستخدمين، فهذا يعني انك قد وصلت الي الحد الاقصي لعدد

title: Unfollowing Users
label: Unfollowing Users

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing to unfollow a user go to their profile page tap the icon in the top right corner and select unfollow important there is a 3 hour waiting period after you first follow someone you can only unfollow them after this time has passed this waiting period encourages users to think before following and prevents rapid follow unfollow spam if you unfollow a large number of accounts on the same day the waiting period may be extended for subsequent unfollows unfollowing removes that user from your following list they will not be notified that you unfollowed them you can always follow them again later if you change your mind but the 3 hour wait will apply again thank you for respecting this policy which helps maintain a healthy social environment best regards sugo support team it s simple to unfollow an account just follow these steps go to the user s profile page by tapping on their avatar tap the icon in the top right corner to open the options menu select unfollow from the list important note there is a 3 hour waiting period after you first follow someone you will only be able to unfollow them after this time has passed please be aware that this waiting period can be extended if you unfollow a large number of accounts at the same day this system helps to encourage genuine community interaction العربيه مرحبا، لالغاء متابعه مستخدم، انتقل الي صفحته الشخصيه، واضغط علي ايقونه في الزاويه العلويه

label: Unable to Send Messages

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you cannot send a message to another user tap the red exclamation mark next to the failed message to see the specific reason here are the common causes and solutions insufficient coins you do not have enough coins to pay the message price recharge your account or earn free coins through tasks network issue your internet connection is unstable run network diagnostic me settings about network diagnostic and try switching between wi fi and mobile data blocked by user the other user has blocked you if you see that the message was sent but rejected this is the reason you cannot message a user who has blocked you recipient left the app or deleted account if the account is no longer active messages will fail technical glitch close the app completely and reopen it or clear the app cache most message failures are due to insufficient coins or being blocked check your balance and respect other users privacy best regards sugo support team if your message cannot be sent successfully please tap the red exclamation mark next to the failed message to check the specific reason common reasons include in most cases the issue is caused by insufficient coin balance please recharge your coins and try sending the message again if you have enough coins but cannot send messages to any users please check your network by going to me page settings about network diagnostic then try switching to another

title: Blocking Users
label: Blocking Users
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Social, Moments & Community › Following, Blocking & Reporting
titleNorm: function social blocking users blocking users
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community following blocking reporting sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community following blocking reporting
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you no longer wish to receive messages or interactions from a specific user you can block them go to the user s profile page tap on their avatar anywhere in the app tap the icon in the top right corner of their profile select block from the menu once blocked the user cannot send you messages follow you or view your profile you will not appear in their lists and they will not appear in yours blocking is reversible you can unblock a user from your blacklist see next section blocking does not notify the user it is a silent action use the block feature to protect your peace of mind we encourage users to block rather than engage with harassers best regards sugo support team if you d rather not receive messages from a user tap their avatar to visit their profile page then click the expand menu button in the top right corner you ll find the block option there to stop their messages quick and easy العربيه مرحبا، اذا كنت لا ترغب في تلقي رسايل او تفاعلات من مستخدم معين، يمكنك حظره انتقل الي صفحه ملف المستخدم اضغط علي صورته الرمزيه في اي مكان في التطبيق اضغط علي ايقونه في الزاويه العلويه اليمني من ملفه الشخصي اختر حظر من القايمه بمجرد الحظر، لا يمكن للمستخدم ارسال رسايل اليك او متابعتك او عرض ملفك الشخصي لن تظهر في قوايمه، ولن يظهر هو في قوايمك الحظر قابل للالغاء يمكنك الغاء حظر مستخدم من قايمه الحظر الخاصه بك انظر القسم التالي الحظر لا يخطر المستخدم انه اجراء صامت استخدم ميزه الحظر لحمايه

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing to see the list of users you have blocked blacklist and to unblock someone follow these steps go to settings me settings tap on privacy settings select blacklist or blocked users you will see a list of all users you have blocked to unblock tap on the user s name or avatar and select unblock daily unblock limit to prevent misuse there is a daily limit on how many users you can unblock if you exceed this limit you will see a notification and must wait until the next day unblocking allows that user to interact with you again they will not be notified of the unblock you can re block a user at any time after unblocking regularly review your blacklist to keep it clean best regards sugo support team managing your blacklist is simple here s how to find it and remove a user select blacklist to see all the users you have blocked find the user you wish to unblock and select the option to remove them from the list to prevent misuse of this feature there is a daily limit on how many users you can remove from your blacklist if you have unblocked too many people in one day you will see a notification and will be unable to unblock more if this happens please wait until the next day to continue العربيه مرحبا، لرويه قايمه المستخدمين الذين قمت بحظرهم القايمه السوداء ولالغاء حظر شخص ما، اتبع هذه الخطوات انتقل الي الاعدادات انا الاعدادات اضغط علي اعدادات الخصوصيه اختر القايمه السوداء او المستخدمون

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you encounter a user whose behavior or posted content violates our community guidelines you can report them here is how profile violation inappropriate nickname avatar or bio go to their profile tap report select the specific violation category message violation harassment spam etc in the chat long press the offending message report choose the reason room behavior voice or video room while in the room tap the user s avatar to open the mini card report provide a brief description and evidence if possible moment or comment on the moment or comment tap the menu report required evidence for serious violations we recommend taking screenshots or screen recordings as proof our team reviews all reports we take action only if the reported content clearly violates our guidelines reporting is anonymous the reported user will not know who reported them thank you for helping us keep sugo safe best regards sugo support team العربيه مرحبا، اذا واجهت مستخدما ينتهك سلوكه او محتواه المنشور ارشادات المجتمع، فيمكنك الابلاغ عنه اليك الطريقه انتهاك الملف الشخصي اسم مستعار او صوره او سيره ذاتيه غير لايقه انتقل الي ملفه الشخصي اضغط علي ابلاغ اختر فيه الانتهاك المحدده انتهاك الرساله تحرش، بريد عشوايي، الخ في الدردشه، اضغط مطولا علي الرساله المخالفه ابلاغ اختر السبب سلوك في الغرفه غرفه صوتيه او فيديو اثناء وجودك في الغرفه، اضغط علي الصوره الرمزيه للمستخدم لفتح البطاقه المصغره ابلاغ قدم وصفا موجزا ودليلا

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing you can personalize your chat with a custom background image follow these steps open a chat with any friend tap your friend s avatar in the top right corner of the chat screen from the menu that appears select chat background settings you will see options choose a default background from the app or select a photo from your device gallery if you choose a photo from your gallery you may be able to crop or adjust it confirm your selection the background will be applied immediately to that chat only to reset to the default background go back to the same settings and choose reset or default different chats can have different backgrounds your setting is saved per conversation enjoy making your chats more personal and fun best regards sugo support team in your chat with a friend tap your friend s avatar in the top right corner then select chat background settings from the options and you can pick a picture from your device to use as a new background العربيه مرحبا، يمكنك تخصيص محادثتك بصوره خلفيه مخصصه اتبع هذه الخطوات افتح محادثه مع اي صديق اضغط علي صوره صديقك الرمزيه في الزاويه العلويه اليمني من شاشه المحادثه من القايمه التي تظهر، اختر اعدادات خلفيه الدردشه ستري خيارات اختر خلفيه افتراضيه من التطبيق، او اختر صوره من معرض جهازك اذا اخترت صوره من معرضك، قد تتمكن من قصها او تعديلها اكد اختيارك سيتم تطبيق الخلفيه علي تلك المحادثه فقط فورا لاعاده التعيين الي الخلفيه الافتراضيه، ارجع الي نفس

title: Deleting Chat History
label: Deleting Chat History

titleNorm: function social delete chat history deleting chat history
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community messaging chat costs chat tools sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community messaging chat costs chat tools
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing you can delete your entire chat history with a specific user this action is permanent and cannot be undone open the chat you wish to delete tap your friend s avatar in the top right corner of the chat screen from the menu select delete chat history a confirmation pop up will appear warning that the deletion is permanent confirm by tapping delete or ok all messages in that conversation will be removed from your device and our servers your friend s copy of the chat history will remain on their device deleting your side does not delete theirs this action cannot be reversed you will not be able to retrieve any deleted messages if you later send a new message to that user a new chat thread will start with no history use this feature carefully if you only want to clear the conversation from your view without deleting consider archiving or just ignoring it best regards sugo support team in your chat with a friend tap your friend s avatar in the top right corner then select delete chat history from the options please note that this will permanently remove the chat history and it cannot be recovered once deleted proceed with care العربيه مرحبا، يمكنك حذف سجل محادثتك بالكامل مع مستخدم معين هذا الاجراء دايم ولا يمكن التراجع عنه افتح المحادثه التي ترغب في حذفها اضغط علي صوره صديقك الرمزيه في الزاويه العلويه اليمني من شاشه المحادثه من القايمه، اختر حذف سجل الدردشه ستظهر نافذه تاكيد تحذر من ان

title: Chat Points Overview and Mechanics
label: Chat Points Overview and Mechanics
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Social, Moments & Community › Chat Points, Diamonds & Gifts
titleNorm: function social chat points overview chat points overview and mechanics
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community chat points diamonds gifts sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community chat points diamonds gifts
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing chat points are a score for female users that reflects their activity and popularity in private chats why important higher chat points increase your profile exposure leading to more matches and messages chat star status unlock chat star for 7 days by reaching 80 chat points and completing all verifications chat star gives exclusive privileges how points are calculated your points are based on your activity over the last 7 days rolling window it includes the number of messages replied to call duration and gifts received update time points are calculated once per day typically around 4 00 utc 0 how to increase stay active every day reply to messages promptly answer calls and engage positively how to maintain consistency is key if you skip a day points earned 8 days ago will drop off potentially reducing your score chat points are a measure of your engagement keep chatting to keep your points high best regards sugo support team chat points are a score only for female users that shows how active and popular you are in private chats on our platform think of it as your chat reputation العربيه مرحبا، نقاط الدردشه هي درجه للمستخدمات الاناث تعكس نشاطهن وشعبيتهن في الدردشات الخاصه لماذا هي مهمه تزيد نقاط الدردشه المرتفعه من ظهور ملفك الشخصي، مما يودي الي المزيد من التطابقات والرسايل حاله نجم الدردشه افتحي نجم الدردشه لمده 7 ايام من خلال الوصول الي 80 نقطه دردشه واكمال جميع التحققات يمنح نجم

title: Importance of Chat Points
label: Importance of Chat Points
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Social, Moments & Community › Chat Points, Diamonds & Gifts
titleNorm: function social chat points importance importance of chat points
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community chat points diamonds gifts sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community chat points diamonds gifts
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing chat points are more than just a number they directly impact your experience on sugo higher exposure users with high chat points are shown more often in match recommendations and search results more interactions you receive more messages and friend requests because people see your profile more frequently chat star privileges unlocking chat star gives you exclusive badges higher visibility and sometimes bonus diamonds credibility a high chat point score signals to others that you are an active responsive and genuine user rewards some monthly events or tasks may reward users with high chat points invest your time in meaningful conversations quality and consistency both matter best regards sugo support team العربيه مرحبا، نقاط الدردشه هي اكثر من مجرد رقم انها توثر بشكل مباشر علي تجربتك في sugo ظهور اعلي يتم عرض المستخدمين ذوي نقاط الدردشه المرتفعه في كثير من الاحيان في توصيات المطابقه ونتايج البحث تفاعلات اكثر تتلقين رسايل وطلبات صداقه اكثر لان الناس يرون ملفك الشخصي بشكل متكرر امتيازات نجم الدردشه فتح نجم الدردشه يمنحك شارات حصريه ورويه اعلي واحيانا ماس اضافي المصداقيه تشير درجه نقاط الدردشه المرتفعه للاخرين الي انك مستخدم نشط ومستجيب وحقيقي المكافات قد تكافي بعض الفعاليات او المهام الشهريه المستخدمين ذوي نقاط الدردشه المرتفعه استثمري وقتك في محادثات هادفه الجوده والاتساق كلاهما مهم مع اطيب التحيات، فريق دعم sugo

title: Chat Points Decrease Despite Chat Star Status
label: Chat Points Decrease Despite Chat Star Status
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Social, Moments & Community › Chat Points, Diamonds & Gifts
titleNorm: function social chat points decrease chat points decrease despite chat star status
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community chat points diamonds gifts sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community chat points diamonds gifts
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you are a chat star but your chat points have decreased do not worry this is normal and can happen for two reasons your activity decreased if you were less active today than you were 7 days ago your rolling 7 day average may drop for example if you replied to many messages 7 days ago and fewer today your score will drop when those older high activity days fall out of the window others became more active the ranking is relative even if you maintain the same activity level other users may have become more active pushing your relative position down tip to maintain a high score you need to be consistently active every day not just occasionally chat star status is based on achieving 80 points not on maintaining a specific rank you can still be a chat star even if your points fluctuate slightly keep engaging daily best regards sugo support team think of your chat points not just as a score but as your rank compared to all other users on the platform your rank can change for two main reasons your own activity changes if you are less active than you were in the previous days your score will naturally decrease other users became more active this is the most common reason even if you maintain the same level of activity your rank can go down if other users became more active and popular than you they are essentially moving up the leaderboard which can shift your position down in comparison

title: No Diamonds for Replying to Male Users
label: No Diamonds for Replying to Male Users
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Social, Moments & Community › Chat Points, Diamonds & Gifts
titleNorm: function social no diamonds replying no diamonds for replying to male users
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community chat points diamonds gifts sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community chat points diamonds gifts
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you are a female user and you replied to a male user s message but did not receive diamonds here are the possible reasons the male user blocked you before your reply if he blocked you between sending his message and your reply your reply cannot be delivered and therefore the diamond reward is not triggered the account changed gender from female to male after sending the message some accounts may have originally been female and later changed gender if a message was sent while the account was female replying after the gender change to male does not generate a diamond reward system detection our system correctly identifies these edge cases and does not award diamonds what to do unfortunately there is no way to recover diamonds in these situations you can still reply but no reward will be given focus on users who are verified male from the start if you believe this was an error please provide the conversation details and a screenshot for review best regards sugo support team if you replied to a message but didn t get a reward it s typically due to one of two situations the user blocked you before your reply it s possible that between the time the user sent you their message and the time you replied they blocked your profile if this happens your reply cannot be delivered and therefore the diamond transaction does not occur the male account was a female before sometimes some accounts

title: Transferring Gifts to User Backpack
label: Transferring Gifts to User Backpack
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Social, Moments & Community › Chat Points, Diamonds & Gifts
titleNorm: function social transfer gifts transferring gifts to user backpack
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community chat points diamonds gifts sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community chat points diamonds gifts
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing you can transfer a gift item the actual gift not its diamond value to another user s backpack here is how go to your backpack me backpack find the gift item you wish to transfer not all gifts are transferable only those with a send button are eligible tap on the gift item a pop up window will appear if you see a send button tap it if you only see use or equip the gift cannot be transferred select the user you want to send the gift to confirm the transfer the gift will be moved from your backpack to theirs important difference if you send a gift from within a chat or room the recipient receives the diamond value not the item to transfer the item itself use the backpack method this feature is useful for gifting items that the recipient may want to use or re gift best regards sugo support team how to transfer a gift item to a backpack navigate to your me page and open your backpack tap on the specific gift item you wish to transfer a pop up window will appear if this item is eligible for transfer you will see a send button tap send and choose the user you want to give the item to the gift will then be moved directly to their backpack please note not all gift items can be transferred the send button will only appear for eligible gifts important sending gifts vs transferring items it is important to understand the difference between these two actions transferring from your main backpack

title: Message Translation Not Available
label: Message Translation Not Available
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Social, Moments & Community › Messaging, Chat Costs & Chat Tools
titleNorm: function social translation not available message translation not available
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community messaging chat costs chat tools sugo knowledgebase mena social moments community messaging chat costs chat tools
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you are unable to translate a message or receive a notification that the daily translation limit has been reached here is why the translation feature has a daily limit of 55 uses per user this limit helps manage server load and prevent abuse once you exceed 55 translations in a single day the feature becomes unavailable until the next day the limit resets at midnight 00 00 based on your local time zone or utc translation is available for most languages but some less common languages may not be supported to use translation efficiently only translate messages you truly do not understand if you need to translate more than 55 messages per day consider using an external translation app as an alternative thank you for understanding this reasonable limit best regards sugo support team if you are unable to translate other users messages or receive a notification saying that the daily translation limit has been reached it is because there is a usage limit for the translation feature each user can use the translation function up to 55 once this limit is exceeded the translation feature will be temporarily unavailable you will see a reminder indicating that the daily limit has been reached we recommend trying again the next day when your translation quota has been reset العربيه مرحبا، اذا لم تكن قادرا علي ترجمه رساله او تلقيت اشعارا بان الحد اليومي للترجمه قد تم الوصول اليه، فاليك السبب

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you are unable to post a moment photo video or text update please follow these steps to identify and resolve the issue first check if any error message appears on the screen when you try to post the message often explains the reason such as content violates guidelines or network error the most common cause is that our automated system has detected content that may violate our community guidelines this includes sensitive words inappropriate images or videos with watermarks from other apps review your content carefully remove any text that could be considered offensive spammy or promotional avoid using watermarks from competing platforms if you believe your content follows all rules try posting again after a few minutes sometimes it is a temporary system check if the problem persists take a screenshot of the error message if any and save the content you tried to post then upload your app log me settings about sugo upload app log to help our technical team diagnose the issue after uploading you can send the error screenshot and content description for further review we want you to share your moments freely but we must also keep the platform safe for everyone we once again sincerely apologize for the inconvenience we have caused and we truly thank you for your patience and understanding we wish you a happy and successful day sugo customer service team best regards sugo support team we

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you are unable to post a comment on someone s moment you may have reached one of our daily or per minute limits please review the following per minute limit you can post a maximum of 3 comments per minute this prevents spam and rapid fire commenting daily limit you can post a maximum of 50 comments per day after that you must wait until the next day to comment again if you have reached the per minute limit wait one or two minutes and try again the limit resets quickly if you have reached the daily limit you will be able to comment again after midnight your local time these limits apply to all users equally and help maintain a positive environment in the moments section if you are not near any limit but still cannot comment check your internet connection or restart the app thank you for respecting these reasonable limits they ensure that everyone gets a fair chance to engage best regards sugo support team if you re suddenly unable to post a comment to moments it s likely because you ve reached one of our commenting limits to help prevent spam and ensure a positive experience for everyone in the community we have the following rules in place if you ve reached the per minute limit please just wait a minute or two before trying again if you ve reached the daily limit you will be able to comment again the next day العربيه مرحبا، اذا لم تتمكن من نشر تعليق علي لحظه شخص ما، فقد تكون قد

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you wish to end a relationship cp or best friend with another user you have two options request termination or force termination request termination this option requires the other user s consent you send a termination request and if they agree the relationship ends immediately no coins are deducted force termination you can end the relationship unilaterally by spending 2000 coins the other user is not notified in advance but they will see that the relationship has ended steps to terminate go to your profile page relationships tab find the relationship you want to end tap the edit button then select terminate or end relationship choose request termination or force termination if available after termination all relationship benefits stop immediately your intimacy level does not reset to zero it remains but the relationship status is removed you can form a new relationship with the same user or with others later note if you force terminate the 2000 coins are non refundable choose wisely as relationships are meant to be meaningful connections best regards sugo support team to end a relationship you can start by initiating a termination request or opt for a forced termination through the relationship wall a request based termination needs the other person s consent while a forced termination can be done on your own by spending 2000 coins go to your own profile page tap on the

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing guarding is a special feature that allows you to become a protector of another user here is how it works and how to become a guardian what is a guardian a guardian is a user who sends a true love guardian card to another user this card is a special gift that establishes a guardianship relationship how to become a guardian go to the user s profile page look for the guardian entry often a shield icon or guard button tap guard and send the true love guardian card costs coins display after you become a guardian your profile picture will be displayed on the user s mini card and personal profile page multiple guardians if multiple users guard the same person only the one with the highest guardian points earned by sending additional gifts will be displayed guardian points you earn guardian points by sending gifts to the person you guard 4 coins 1 guardian point maintenance guardian points are tracked weekly if you send no gifts during a week points decrease 20 if above 250 or 50 points if below 250 if points reach zero guardianship ends grace period new guardians have a first week grace period with no point deduction guarding is a way to show special support for someone you care about best regards sugo support team if you d like to become a guardian for someone visit their profile page and look for the guardian entry you ll spot the guard button there you can become the guardian of another

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing guardian points are a measure of your support as a guardian understanding how they work helps you maintain your guardianship status earning points every 4 coins you spend on gifts sent to the person you guard gives you 1 guardian point there is no limit on how many points you can earn weekly calculation points are tracked from monday 00 00 to sunday 23 59 your local time decay if inactive if you send no gifts during a full week your points will decrease on the following monday at 00 00 if your points are 250 or more 20 of your points are deducted if your points are below 250 50 points are deducted each time until zero end of guardianship when your points reach zero you are no longer a guardian you can re apply by sending another true love guardian card grace period for new guardians in your first week as a guardian no points will be deducted even if you send no gifts this gives you time to learn the system how to check your points go to your profile guardianship section you will see your current points and the remaining time before the next deduction how to increase points send more gifts to the person you guard regular small gifts are better than occasional large ones to keep points stable maintaining a guardianship requires consistent support keep gifting to stay visible as a guardian best regards sugo support team after becoming a guardian you can boost your guardian points by

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you prefer not to show your guardianship status to others you can hide it here is how go to settings me settings tap on privacy settings look for the guardianship or display guardianship toggle turn it off once hidden other users cannot become your guardian the guard button will be disabled on your profile your guardianship details will not appear in the guardian ranking or guardian cp ranking your existing guardians will still be active but others will not see the relationship to show your guardianship again simply turn the toggle back on this setting is personal it does not affect your ability to guard others only your visibility as a guardian or as someone who can be guarded privacy is important you control what others see best regards sugo support team yes you can go to setting and select privacy setting then turn off the guardianship toggle to hide it once turned off other users won t be able to become your guardian and your guardianship details won t show up in the guardian ranking or guardian cp ranking it s all about your privacy العربيه مرحبا، اذا كنت تفضل عدم اظهار حاله الحمايه الخاصه بك للاخرين، فيمكنك اخفاوها اليك الطريقه انتقل الي الاعدادات انا الاعدادات اضغط علي اعدادات الخصوصيه ابحث عن مفتاح الحمايه او عرض الحمايه اطفيه بمجرد الاخفاء لا يمكن للمستخدمين الاخرين ان يصبحوا حماه لك سيتم تعطيل زر حمايه في ملفك الشخصي لن تظهر تفاصيل حمايتك في تصنيف الحماه او تصنيف cp

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing you can create your own voice or video room on sugo to host conversations events or just hang out with friends how to create go to the room page usually from the bottom navigation bar tap the create button in the top right corner choose room type voice room or video room set a room name description and cover image optional configure settings maximum number of microphones entry password optional and who can speak everyone or only admins tap create the room will be created instantly and you will be the owner room level new rooms start at level 1 as your room gains activity listening time gifts sent in the room it levels up unlocking more features e g video mode at level 3 more mic slots managing your room as owner you can appoint administrators kick or block users change settings and view room statistics cost creating a room is free however some advanced features may require coins or vip status your room is your space invite friends and build your community best regards sugo support team to create your own room go to the room page and tap the create button in the top right corner you re all set to start your own space العربيه مرحبا، يمكنك انشاء غرفه صوت او فيديو خاصه بك علي sugo لاستضافه المحادثات او الاحداث او مجرد قضاء الوقت مع الاصدقاء كيفيه الانشاء انتقل الي صفحه الغرفه عاده من شريط التنقل السفلي اضغط علي زر انشاء في الزاويه العلويه اليمني اختر نوع الغرفه غرفه صوتيه او غرفه فيديو

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing to open a live video room where you broadcast your camera your room must first reach level 3 here is the path room level 1 basic voice room with limited mic slots room level 2 more mic slots and basic moderation tools room level 3 video mode unlocked you can now switch your room to video mode how to level up your room gains experience points exp based on the total time users spend in the room and the gifts sent within the room the more active your room the faster it levels switching to video mode once your room is level 3 or higher enter your room tap the menu top right select room mode choose video and select your preferred video layout e g single host panel discussion requirements for video you must have a camera enabled device and grant camera permissions to the app note video rooms consume more battery and data ensure you have a good internet connection reaching level 3 takes time and community engagement keep your room active to unlock video broadcasting best regards sugo support team to activate the video mode for your room your room must first reach level 3 how to switch to video mode once unlocked once your room has reached level 3 or higher you can switch to video mode at any time by following these steps enter your room and tap the menu in the top right corner select room mode from the options choose video and select a mode to instantly switch your room to live video

label: Incorrect Room Password Error Resolution

titleNorm: function room incorrect password incorrect room password error resolution
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena rooms hosts agency operations room creation settings room tags sugo knowledgebase mena rooms hosts agency operations room creation settings room tags
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you see the message you have entered an incorrect room password too many times you cannot enter the room temporarily here is what it means and how to resolve it why it happens as a security measure to protect private rooms the system temporarily locks out users who enter the wrong password multiple times in a row lock duration the lock lasts for 30 minutes from the last incorrect attempt what to do wait 30 minutes without trying again the lock will automatically expire contact the room owner or an admin to confirm the correct password do not guess repeatedly after lock expires you can try again if you still do not know the password ask the owner prevention if you are unsure of the password ask before attempting even one wrong attempt counts toward the limit owner note room owners can see failed entry attempts in their room logs they can also reset the lock for a specific user if needed this security feature protects private rooms from brute force attacks we once again sincerely apologize for the inconvenience we have caused and we truly thank you for your patience and understanding we wish you a happy and successful day sugo customer service team best regards sugo support team this message appears as a security measure to protect the privacy of locked rooms after too many incorrect password attempts to resolve this you will need to wait for 30 minutes before you can try entering

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if your gender or profile photo verification fails here are the common reasons and how to fix them reason 1 the person in the verification does not match the profile photos make sure you are using a recent clear photo of yourself do not use filters or editing that alter your face significantly reason 2 not a live person our system requires a real time photo or video do not submit a photo of a photo a screenshot or an ai generated image reason 3 poor lighting or obscured face ensure you are in a well lit room and your face is fully visible no masks sunglasses or hats that cover eyes how to retry go to verification center on your me page follow the on screen instructions carefully if you fail again wait 24 hours before trying again to prevent brute force attempts if you believe it was a mistake provide a clear photo of yourself holding a handwritten note with your id and the current date along with a screenshot of the failure message verification is important for account security and access to certain features we appreciate your cooperation best regards sugo support team we re sorry to hear you re having trouble with verification as a female user you can complete your gender verification and profile image verification in the verification center on your me page if your verification failed it is usually for one of these common reasons person doesn t match profile the person completing

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if your application to join an agency is rejected with the reason that you have another account here is the explanation our system checks when you submit an anchor application our system automatically scans your device for any other registered anchor accounts face verification cross check the system also compares the face photo you submit for verification against existing anchor faces if a match is found the application is rejected why this policy we allow only one host account per person to ensure fairness and prevent multiple accounts from dominating the platform what can you do if you have another host account you must use that account to host you cannot create a second host account if you believe this is an error e g sibling using the same device contact support with evidence no appeal rejections for this reason are final for that account you cannot reapply with the same account we appreciate your honesty and cooperation best regards sugo support team when you submit your anchor application our system automatically checks your current device for any other registered anchor accounts if you ve previously submitted an agency join request that was rejected for this reason it ll block the current account from applying again to keep things fair additionally the system reviews the submitted face for authentication to ensure it doesn t match any existing anchor faces if another account

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing car tycoon is a social game where you park vehicles in other users spaces to earn profits here is how to play obtain a vehicle you start with a basic vehicle you can buy better vehicles from the store using coins parking tap on another user s parking space on their profile or in the game center to park your vehicle the longer you park the more coins you earn collect earnings after the parking period ends you can collect your profit if you forget the system auto collects after a certain time interactive cards complete tasks or open treasure chests to earn special cards support card ticket card etc use them to increase parking profits steal profits from other players vehicles protect your vehicles from fines fines each vehicle has a fine free protection period initially after that other players can fine your vehicle if your vehicle receives three fines it is removed from the parking space and you lose uncollected profits leaderboard compete with others for the highest profit top players get rewards check your cards in the backpack enjoy the game best regards sugo support team basic gameplay after obtaining a vehicle users can click to park it in other users parking spaces to earn profits the longer the vehicle is parked the higher the profits generated vehicle upgrades users can accumulate coins by parking and use them to purchase vehicles in the store more luxurious vehicles generate

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing we understand that losing streaks can be frustrating however we want to assure you that all game results on sugo are 100 fair and random how games work our games operate on fixed rules and probabilities each outcome is determined by a certified random number generator rng no manipulation we do not control who wins or loses the platform does not have the ability to favor or disadvantage any specific user third party audits our game systems are regularly audited by independent third parties to ensure fairness what you can do if you feel a game is unfair you can stop playing that game you can review game statistics win rates over time they should average out we encourage responsible gaming set limits for yourself reporting if you have evidence of actual manipulation e g a bug please report it with screenshots and detailed steps to reproduce we are committed to providing a fair gaming environment good luck in your next game best regards sugo support team we understand that experiencing a losing streak can be frustrating and we take all concerns about fairness very seriously we want to assure you that the outcome of our games is 100 fair and is never manipulated we do not control who wins or loses our games operate on a fixed set of rules and probabilities by nature every round will have both winners and losers and the result is determined entirely by the game s mechanics and random

title: Ladder Ranking System
label: Ladder Ranking System

titleNorm: function cot ladder ranking ladder ranking system
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena games events clash of thrones clash of thrones basics progression sugo knowledgebase mena games events clash of thrones clash of thrones basics progression
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing the ladder ranking system in clash of thrones allows you to compete against other players and climb the ranks to earn better rewards please read the following explanation carefully rank tiers there are multiple tiers such as bronze silver gold platinum diamond and king each tier is divided into several divisions e g bronze iii bronze ii bronze i gaining points you earn rank points by winning battles against opponents at or above your current rank the amount of points gained depends on the difference in combat power losing points losing a battle reduces your rank points the higher your rank the more points you may lose per defeat promotion when you accumulate enough points you advance to the next division or tier promotion matches may be required for higher tiers demotion if you lose too many battles at zero points in a division you may be demoted to the previous division seasonal rewards each season typically lasts one month at the end of the season rewards are distributed based on your highest achieved rank higher ranks receive better rewards including starlight exclusive skins and upgrade materials leaderboard visibility top players are displayed on a public leaderboard you can view the leaderboard from the ladder ranking screen tips for climbing upgrade your castle and army consistently use optimal formations and participate in alliance buffs defensive strategy also matters

title: Upgrading Castle
label: Upgrading Castle

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we are very happy and honored to have you with us how can we assist you today the castle is the heart of your kingdom in clash of thrones upgrading it unlocks new features and significantly boosts your combat power how to upgrade go to the castle screen check the required resources wood stone gold sometimes starlight and if you have enough tap upgrade benefits of upgrading increases resource production speed unlocks new buildings barracks defense towers research lab etc raises your maximum troop capacity increases your overall combat power rating upgrade time each level takes time from minutes to days higher levels take longer speeding up you can use starlight to instantly complete an upgrade priority castle should be your top upgrade priority because it enables all other progress even small castle upgrades add up over time keep upgrading continuously best regards sugo support team upgrading the castle will require exps for the castle and silver coins inside this game العربيه مرحبا، القلعه هي قلب مملكتك في clash of thrones ترقيتها تفتح ميزات جديده وتعزز قوتك القتاليه بشكل كبير كيفيه الترقيه انتقل الي شاشه القلعه، وتحقق من الموارد المطلوبه الخشب، الحجر، الذهب، احيانا starlight ، واذا كان لديك ما يكفي، فاضغط علي ترقيه فوايد الترقيه تزيد من سرعه انتاج الموارد تفتح مباني جديده ثكنات، ابراج دفاعيه، مختبر ابحاث، الخ تزيد من الحد الاقصي لسعه قواتك تزيد من تصنيف قوتك القتاليه الاجماليه وقت الترقيه كل مستوي يستغرق وقتا من دقايق الي ايام المستويات

pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena games events clash of thrones clash of thrones basics progression sugo knowledgebase mena games events clash of thrones clash of thrones basics progression
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we are very happy and honored to have you with us how can we assist you today treasure chests in clash of thrones can be opened automatically after a timer expires here is how it works timer chests many chests have a countdown timer e g 1 hour 8 hours when the timer reaches zero the chest opens automatically and you receive the rewards manual opening you can also open chests instantly using keys or starlight this bypasses the timer queue system you can have multiple chests queued for automatic opening the queue time adds up you can only open one chest at a time notification you will receive an in game notification when a chest finishes opening best practice for common chests with short timers let them open automatically save keys and starlight for rare chests with long timers e g 12 hours or more no daily limit you can open as many chests as you have but timer chests take real time automatic opening allows you to progress even when you are not actively playing best regards sugo support team after you upgrade your castle level to 7 you will be able to have the automatic option to open the treasure chest العربيه مرحبا، يمكن فتح صناديق الكنز في clash of thrones تلقاييا بعد انتهاء الموقت اليك كيفيه عمل ذلك صناديق الموقت تحتوي العديد من الصناديق علي موقت للعد التنازلي مثال ساعه واحده، 8 ساعات عندما يصل الموقت الي الصفر، يفتح الصندوق تلقاييا وتتلقي المكافات الفتح اليدوي يمكنك ايضا فتح الصناديق فورا باستخدام المفاتيح او starlight هذا يتجاوز الموقت

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you cannot join an alliance here are the most common reasons and solutions you are already in an alliance leave your current alliance first note the cooldown period alliance is full alliances have member limits usually 30 to 100 wait for a spot to open or try another alliance your power is too low some alliances set a minimum combat power requirement increase your power by upgrading buildings and troops alliance is closed and your application was rejected try a different alliance or improve your profile e g higher castle level cooldown period after leaving an alliance you may need to wait 12 24 hours before joining another technical issue restart the app if the problem persists provide your id and the alliance id for review respect alliance rules not all alliances accept everyone best regards sugo support team there might be two reasons level requirement your castle level is below the alliance s minimum set by the leader solution search for and apply to other alliances with lower thresholds cooldown period you left an alliance less than 24 hours ago wait out the full 24 hour timer before trying again العربيه مرحبا، اذا لم تتمكن من الانضمام الي تحالف، فاليك الاسباب الاكثر شيوعا والحلول انت بالفعل في تحالف اترك تحالفك الحالي اولا لاحظ فتره التهديه التحالف ممتلي التحالفات لها حدود للاعضاء عاده 30 الي 100 انتظر حتي يتاح مكان او جرب تحالفا اخر قوتك منخفضه جدا تضع بعض التحالفات حدا ادني

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing once you are in an alliance you can join the alliance s external group often on whatsapp telegram or discord for better communication how to join alliance leaders usually share the group link in the in game alliance chat benefits real time communication easy sharing of strategies screenshots and attack plans coordinate war times and resource donations rules follow the alliance s external group rules they may include language preferences activity expectations and respect policies safety do not share personal information phone address passwords in external groups if you cannot join ask the leader to resend the link make sure you have the required app installed being active in the external group makes the alliance experience much more rewarding best regards sugo support team after you join an alliance you will receive a message through the official account you can tap the link and enter your alliance s group to communicate with everyone in the same alliance العربيه مرحبا، بمجرد ان تكون في تحالف، يمكنك الانضمام الي مجموعه التحالف الخارجيه عاده علي whatsapp او telegram او discord لتواصل افضل كيفيه الانضمام عاده ما يشارك قاده التحالف رابط المجموعه في دردشه التحالف داخل اللعبه الفوايد التواصل في الوقت الفعلي سهوله مشاركه الاستراتيجيات ولقطات الشاشه وخطط الهجوم تنسيق اوقات الحرب والتبرعات بالموارد القواعد اتبع قواعد المجموعه الخارجيه للتحالف قد تتضمن تفضيلات اللغه وتوقعات النشاط وسياسات

title: Leaving Alliance
label: Leaving Alliance
section: Clash of Thrones — Alliance & Guardian Beast
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Games, Events & Clash of Thrones › Clash of Thrones — Alliance & Guardian Beast
titleNorm: function cot leaving alliance leaving alliance
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena games events clash of thrones clash of thrones alliance guardian beast sugo knowledgebase mena games events clash of thrones clash of thrones alliance guardian beast
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing if you decide to leave your alliance here is how to do it and what to expect how to leave go to the alliance page tap settings or info then select leave alliance confirm your choice consequences you lose all alliance points and contributions they do not transfer you lose access to alliance chat research bonuses and the alliance store you may have a cooldown period e g 12 hours before you can join another alliance if you are the leader you must appoint a new leader before leaving or disband the alliance entirely if you leave by mistake you can rejoin if the alliance accepts you again but your previous contributions will be gone best practice before leaving spend any alliance points you have saved in the alliance store think carefully leaving an active alliance can set your progress back best regards sugo support team you can check your alliance s info by tapping your alliance s logo and you will find a leave alliance option by clicking it you can leave the alliance immediately please note after leaving the alliance there is a 24 hour cooldown period during which you cannot join the alliance العربيه مرحبا، اذا قررت مغادره تحالفك، فاليك كيفيه القيام بذلك وماذا تتوقع كيفيه المغادره انتقل الي صفحه التحالف، واضغط علي الاعدادات او معلومات ، ثم اختر مغادره التحالف اكد اختيارك العواقب تفقد جميع نقاط ومساهمات التحالف لا تنتقل تفقد الوصول الي دردشه التحالف ومكافات الابحاث ومتجر التحالف قد يكون

title: Guardian Beast Explanation
label: Guardian Beast Explanation
section: Clash of Thrones — Alliance & Guardian Beast

titleNorm: function cot guardian beast guardian beast explanation

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing the guardian beast is a powerful companion that fights alongside you in clash of thrones here is everything you need to know what it does the guardian beast provides passive stat bonuses attack defense health and can be deployed in battles for active abilities how to obtain complete the introductory quest chain or purchase it directly with starlight upgrading feed the beast resources meat crystals etc to level it up higher levels give larger bonuses and unlock new skills active skills at certain levels the beast learns active skills that you can manually trigger in battle e g area damage healing shield summoning tickets special events may give tickets to summon temporary beasts with unique abilities appearance skins you can change the beast s look using starlight or event rewards skins do not affect stats importance a well upgraded guardian beast significantly increases your combat power prioritize feeding it daily best regards sugo support team guardian beasts are the guardians of the kingdom deployed guardian beasts provide protection for allied forces during battle they can unleash skills to weaken the enemy or enhance allied attributes they can also directly damage the enemy potentially giving you an advantage guardian beasts must be summoned by the lord using a summoning ticket each summoning yields either a guardian beast or guardian beast fragments consuming guardian beast

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we are very happy and honored to have you with us how can we assist you today guardian beast summoning tickets allow you to summon temporary beasts for a limited duration here is how to get them events limited time events often offer summoning tickets as rewards for completing tasks or ranking high daily tasks some daily task chests contain summoning tickets alliance store if your alliance level is high enough you can purchase tickets using alliance points in game store tickets are occasionally available for direct purchase with starlight or coins achievements reaching certain milestones e g total power castle level grants ticket packs using tickets go to the guardian beast menu select summon and choose the ticket the temporary beast will last for a set period e g 7 days expiration unused tickets may expire after the event ends use them before they disappear temporary beasts provide a great boost for difficult battles or alliance wars best regards sugo support team you can purchase the tickets in store or get them from daily rewards for the ladder ranking العربيه مرحبا، تذاكر استدعاء الحامي تسمح لك باستدعاء وحوش موقته لفتره محدوده اليك كيفيه الحصول عليها الفعاليات تقدم الفعاليات محدوده الوقت غالبا تذاكر استدعاء كمكافات لاكمال المهام او الترتيب العالي المهام اليوميه تحتوي بعض صناديق المهام اليوميه علي تذاكر استدعاء متجر التحالف اذا كان مستوي تحالفك مرتفعا بما يكفي، فيمكنك شراء التذاكر باستخدام نقاط التحالف المتجر داخل اللعبه تتوفر التذاكر

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing city defense structures protect your city from enemy raids and contribute to your overall combat power here is how to upgrade them types of defense buildings walls towers traps and garrison buildings resources needed wood stone gold and sometimes starlight how to upgrade go to the city map tap on a defense building and select upgrade if you have enough resources benefits of upgrading increases damage to attackers reduces damage taken from enemy raids unlocks new defensive abilities e g tower special attacks trap effects increases your combat power rating priority upgrade walls first as they protect all other buildings then upgrade towers for active defense time upgrades take time minutes to hours you can speed up with starlight a strong defense makes your city a less attractive target for enemies best regards sugo support team you can upgrade city defense using stones if you have enough stones you can upgrade to the next level of city defense and you can get stones by finishing expeditions العربيه مرحبا، هياكل الدفاع عن المدينه تحمي مدينتك من غارات الاعداء وتساهم في قوتك القتاليه الاجماليه اليك كيفيه ترقيتها انواع مباني الدفاع الجدران والابراج والفخاخ ومباني الحاميه الموارد المطلوبه الخشب والحجر والذهب واحيانا starlight كيفيه الترقيه انتقل الي خريطه المدينه، واضغط علي مبني دفاعي، واختر ترقيه اذا كان لديك موارد كافيه فوايد الترقيه تزيد الضرر الذي يلحق بالمهاجمين تقلل الضرر المتكبد من

bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing the in game chat in clash of thrones allows you to communicate with other players here are the available channels and rules world chat public channel where all players can talk use it to ask questions find allies or chat casually alliance chat private channel for your alliance members only best for coordination and strategy private messages direct messages to individual players tap on a player s name or avatar to send a private message system messages automated messages about events battles alliance updates and rewards chat rules no spamming harassment hate speech or inappropriate language no advertising other games or services no sharing of personal information violations may lead to chat restrictions temporary mute or account bans language most players use english or their local language be respectful of others emojis and stickers you can use standard emojis some custom stickers are available through events use chat wisely to build friendships and coordinate effectively best regards sugo support team you can tap the chat area and chat with other gamers you can even tap the translation option to translate the messages العربيه مرحبا، تتيح لك الدردشه داخل اللعبه في clash of thrones التواصل مع اللاعبين الاخرين اليك القنوات والقواعد المتاحه الدردشه العالميه قناه عامه حيث يمكن لجميع اللاعبين التحدث استخدمها لطرح الاسيله او العثور علي حلفاء او الدردشه بشكل غير رسمي دردشه التحالف قناه خاصه

titleNorm: function cot starlight starlight usage and acquisition
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena games events clash of thrones clash of thrones basics progression sugo knowledgebase mena games events clash of thrones clash of thrones basics progression
bodyNorm: english welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing starlight is a premium currency in clash of thrones that gives you access to exclusive features and speed ups here is a complete guide how to acquire starlight complete high level achievements e g reach castle level 20 win 100 battles rank in the top 10 or top 100 in limited time events purchase with real money from the in game store rarely as compensation for bugs or server issues how to use starlight speed up upgrades instantly finish building research or training timers buy rare items legendary equipment exclusive skins summoning tickets and resource packs unlock features some advanced features require starlight to unlock permanently e g extra building queue event entry some premium events charge starlight as an entry fee but offer much better rewards best practices do not waste starlight on short timers e g 5 minutes save it for long timers e g 2 days save for limited time legendary items that appear in the store use during events that give bonus rewards for spending starlight note starlight is not required to enjoy the game free to play players can still progress just more slowly manage starlight carefully it is a scarce and valuable resource best regards sugo support team when you reach a certain level the constellation will be unblocked there are 12 constellations you can freely choose any constellation and use the starlights you have to light from the beginning different

bodyNorm: answer welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing to verify account ownership please answer the following security questions in one message only in the same order shown below with each answer written on a separate line id the phone model used on the account please send a screenshot from the phone settings showing the device model clearly the phone or email linked to the account if you would like to change the phone please provide both the old number and the new number the account registration date on the sugo app the last time the account was logged in the target for the current month and the previous month if you are a host please provide the target for the current month and the previous month if you are a supporter please send the last two recharge invoices the invoices must be verified through the payment method and must include the transaction number if the recharge was made through a recharge agent please send a screenshot of the conversation between you and the agent inside the sugo app please note that all questions must be answered in order and in one message only any incorrect or unclear information may result in the request being rejected and the procedure not being completed this decision is final with no exceptions we once again sincerely apologize for the inconvenience we have caused and we truly thank you for your patience and understanding we wish you a happy and successful day sugo customer service team ticket welcome

bodyNorm: ticket welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing to continue chatting send unlimited messages send gifts write comments create voice rooms post moments and enjoy games you may need to recharge more coins you can check recharge methods and prices through your profile go to your profile page open recharge choose the coin package you want select the suitable payment method available methods may include google itunes visa and stc pay in saudi arabia you can also use the official recharge link https web app voicemaker media web pay html please note if this is your first recharge visa may be required other methods may become available after reaching vip level 4 depending on your region and account status thank you for contacting sugo we are always happy to serve you we wish you a wonderful day sugo customer service team internal info use when the customer asks how to recharge or needs the available recharge methods التذكره مرحبا بك في عايله سوجو نعتذر جدا علي المشكله التي تواجهك حتي تتمكن من متابعه المحادثه، وارسال رسايل بلا حدود، وارسال الهدايا، وكتابه التعليقات، وانشاء غرف صوتيه، ونشر اللحظات، والاستمتاع بالالعاب، قد تحتاج الي شحن المزيد من الكوينز يمكنك معرفه طرق الشحن والاسعار من خلال صفحتك الشخصيه الدخول الي الصفحه الشخصيه فتح خانه اعاده الشحن اختيار باقه الكوينز المطلوبه اختيار طريقه الدفع المناسبه قد تكون طرق الشحن المتاحه مثل google و itunes و visa و stc pay داخل السعوديه ويمكنك ايضا استخدام رابط الشحن الرسمي https web app

bodyNorm: ticket welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing withdrawal through online management is usually used for hosts from syria lebanon and iraq as these countries are affected by usd restrictions and may not be able to use payoneer please make sure all required withdrawal information is filled in correctly so we can proceed with the payment the salary is usually paid within 1 to 2 working weeks after submitting the withdrawal request the host may receive a voucher from the administration and use it to collect cash from the available money agent in their area we once again sincerely apologize for the inconvenience we have caused and we truly thank you for your patience and understanding we wish you a happy and successful day sugo customer service team internal info use for hosts from syria lebanon or iraq who cannot use payoneer due to usd restrictions التذكره مرحبا بك في عايله سوجو نعتذر جدا علي المشكله التي تواجهك السحب من خلال الاداره عبر الانترنت يستخدم غالبا للمضيفين من سوريا ولبنان والعراق، حيث ان هذه الدول قد تتاثر بقيود الدولار ولا يمكنها استخدام بايونير يرجي التاكد من تعبيه جميع معلومات السحب المطلوبه بشكل صحيح حتي نتمكن من متابعه الدفع عاده يتم دفع الراتب خلال اسبوع الي اسبوعين عمل بعد تقديم طلب السحب قد يحصل المضيف المضيفه علي قسيمه من الاداره لاستخدامها في استلام النقود من وكيل الاموال المتاح في منطقته نكرر اعتذارنا الخالص عن الازعاج الذي تسببنا به، ونشكركم جزيل الشكر علي صبركم وسعه صدركم نتمني لكم يوما سعيدا وموفقا فريق خدمه
