title: sv tickets agency admin whatsapp group
label: sv tickets agency admin whatsapp group
titleNorm: sv tickets agency admin whatsapp group sv tickets agency admin whatsapp group
bodyNorm: answer to create an administrative whatsapp group with management the agency must meet all the following requirements the agency income must double for two consecutive months the agency must achieve 40 million diamonds within 30 days ten new active hosts must be added during the same 30 day period after achieving the requirements the whatsapp group with management will be created in the month following the month in which the target was achieved ticket welcome to the sugo family we are very happy and honored to have you with us how can we assist you today to create an administrative whatsapp group with management the agency must meet the following requirements the agency income must double for two consecutive months the agency must achieve 40 million diamonds within 30 days ten new active hosts must be added during the same 30 day period after achieving these requirements the whatsapp group with management will be created in the following month thank you for contacting sugo we are always happy to serve you we wish you a wonderful day sugo customer service team الاجابه لانشاء جروب اداري علي واتساب مع الاداره، يجب ان تستوفي الوكاله جميع الشروط التاليه ان يتضاعف دخل الوكاله لمده شهرين متتاليين ان تحقق الوكاله 40 مليون ماسه خلال 30 يوما اضافه 10 مضيفات جديدات وفعالات خلال نفس فتره ال 30 يوما بعد تحقيق هذه المتطلبات، يتم انشاء جروب واتساب مع الاداره في الشهر التالي للشهر الذي تم فيه تحقيق التارجت التذكره مرحبا بك في عايله سوجو يسعدنا ويشرفنا جدا تواجدك معنا كيف يمكننا مساعدتك

title: Stolen / Compromised Account
label: Stolen / Compromised Account
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Account, Access & Identity › Security, SMS & Phone Binding
titleNorm: account security stolen stolen compromised account
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity security sms phone binding sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity security sms phone binding
bodyNorm: english sugo does not provide compensation for personal account theft cases caused by leaked shared or exposed passwords if the user still has access to the account the password should be changed immediately passwords verification codes and login access must not be shared with anyone if the user cannot access the account collect the sugo id and ownership evidence then follow the account recovery or binding review path recovery must not be promised before verification is completed we re sorry but we can t offer compensation for personal issues like account theft due to leaked passwords if you suspect your account has been compromised we recommend changing your password right away and never sharing your password with others العربيه لا تقدم sugo تعويضا عن حالات سرقه الحساب الشخصيه الناتجه عن تسريب كلمه المرور او مشاركتها او كشفها اذا كان المستخدم لا يزال يستطيع الدخول الي الحساب، يجب تغيير كلمه المرور فورا يجب عدم مشاركه كلمه المرور او رموز التحقق او بيانات الدخول مع اي شخص اذا لم يعد المستخدم قادرا علي الدخول الي الحساب، يتم جمع معرف sugo واثبات ملكيه الحساب، ثم اتباع مسار مراجعه استرداد الحساب او الربط لا يتم وعد المستخدم بالاسترداد قبل اكتمال التحقق ناسف لذلك، ولكن لا يمكننا تقديم تعويض عن المشكلات الشخصيه مثل سرقه الحساب بسبب تسريب كلمه المرور اذا كنت تشك بان حسابك قد تم اختراقه، ننصحك بتغيير كلمه المرور فورا وعدم مشاركتها مع اي شخص اخر علي الاطلاق

title: Account Self-Ban Request
label: Account Self-Ban Request
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Account, Access & Identity › Ban, Appeal & Account Deletion
titleNorm: account ban self request account self ban request
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity ban appeal account deletion sugo knowledgebase mena account access identity ban appeal account deletion
bodyNorm: english cs can process a self ban when the request clearly comes from the same user for this ban reason the account can be unblocked later if the user requests unblocking vip level 6 and charm level 6 confirm through sobot that the request is from the same user send a screenshot including the chat content and sugo id from sobot mention the monitors directly and monitors can act immediately vip level 6 and charm level 6 mention the vip team first for confirmation then monitors proceed after vip confirmation anchor with charm level 6 and no assigned vip member mention the responsible acm for confirmation vip team involvement is not required anchor with charm level 6 and an assigned vip member mention the responsible vip first to confirm the request with the anchor cs should state clearly that the user is an anchor so monitors understand the case acm mention is not needed before vip approval after vip approval monitors proceed with the ban and then inform the acm in the group acm may check with the agm and negotiate with the anchor if needed while the action follows the anchor s own request for cs we can ban users if they request to ban themselves and for those ban reasons we can unblock the accounts if users requests for users requesting to ban their own accounts cs confirm the request is from the same user through sobot send a screenshot including the chat content and sugo id from sobot mention the monitors directly and monitors take action immediately cs mention the vip team

title: Room Tasks Details
label: Room Tasks Details
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Games, Events & Clash of Thrones › Tasks & Reward Tracking
titleNorm: function tasks room details room tasks details
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena games events clash of thrones tasks reward tracking sugo knowledgebase mena games events clash of thrones tasks reward tracking
bodyNorm: english room owners may have daily room activity tasks shown inside the room task page the exact requirement should be checked from the task page on the user s own account weekly room growth boost weekly earnings task is available only when all eligibility conditions are met the room income from the previous week must be below 400 000 diamonds and the room owner must not be a coin reseller svip user or official account counting rules for the weekly room task gifts sent by the room owner during video live streaming do not count only gifts received inside the room count gifts from private chat 1v1 family and gift wall lighting do not count gift and bag gift count as 1 coin 1 diamond lucky gift counts as 1 coin 0 1 diamond blind box counts as 1 coin 1 diamond according to the actual price of the obtained gift cp token counts as 1 coin 0 1 diamond some users don t have this weekly room task it s only available for users meet the below requirements rooms income 400k diamonds last week roomowners are not resellers svip official accounts gifts sent by the room owner themselves during the video live streaming will not be counted only gifts received within the room would be counted excluding private chats 1v1 family gift wall lighting calculation rules for each gift type same as the logic of the online leaderboard gift bag gift 1 coin 1 diamond lucky gifts 1 coin 0 1 diamonds blind box 1 coin 1 diamond based on the actual price of the gift obtained cp token 1 coin 0 1 diamond daily

title: Weekly Room Task Availability
label: Weekly Room Task Availability
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Games, Events & Clash of Thrones › Tasks & Reward Tracking
titleNorm: function tasks weekly room availability weekly room task availability
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena games events clash of thrones tasks reward tracking sugo knowledgebase mena games events clash of thrones tasks reward tracking
bodyNorm: english the weekly room task is a promotional support task for lower level room owners and is not available to every user the task appears only when the room received less than 400 000 diamonds during the previous week and the room owner is not a coin reseller not an svip user and not an official account owner if the room received 400 000 diamonds or more during the previous week the weekly room task will not appear in the following week the previous week s room diamond income can be checked from rank room rank weekly rank previous week some users don t have this weekly room task it s only available for users meet the below requirements rooms income 400k diamonds last week roomowners are not resellers svip official accounts the weekly room task is a promotional task designed to support lower level room owners therefore not all users will have access to this task to be eligible you must meet all of the following requirements your room received less than 400 000 diamonds during the previous week you are not a coin reseller svip user or official account owner if your room received 400 000 diamonds or more last week the weekly room task will no longer be available to you in the following week please note that eligibility is determined based on your room s performance during the previous week only room owners whose rooms received fewer than 400 000 diamonds in the previous week can receive this task to check how many diamonds were sent to your room last week please go to there

title: Game Whitelist / Blacklist Request
label: Game Whitelist / Blacklist Request
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Games, Events & Clash of Thrones › Games, Events & Compensation
titleNorm: function games whitelist blacklist request game whitelist blacklist request
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena games events clash of thrones games events compensation sugo knowledgebase mena games events clash of thrones games events compensation
bodyNorm: english game access requests are submitted through the games request sheet removal requests do not have eligibility requirements android game access requirements host charm level 3 supporter vip 4 spending more than 4 000 coins outside games such as in sound rooms during last week or this week gives access for the current week spending more than 40 000 coins outside games gives permanent game access iphone game access requirements host charm level 2 supporter vip 3 cs collects the request and submits it through this sheet games request sheet for android users if you are a host you must have an charm level 3 or if you are a supporter your account must be vip 4 if a user spends more than 4 000 coins in other areas such as the sound room etc last week or this week they will have access to the games this week if a user spends more than 40 000 coins in other areas such as the sound room etc they will have permanent access to the games for iphone users if you are a host your charm level 2 is required and if you are a supporter your account must be vip 3 remove games no requirement submit the request through the sheet العربيه طلبات الوصول الي الالعاب ترسل من خلال games request sheet طلبات ازاله الالعاب لا تحتاج الي شروط اهليه شروط الوصول للالعاب علي android المضيف مستوي charm 3 الداعم vip 4 انفاق اكثر من 4 000 كوين خارج الالعاب، مثل غرف الصوت، خلال الاسبوع الماضي او هذا الاسبوع يمنح وصولا للالعاب خلال الاسبوع الحالي انفاق اكثر من 40 000 كوين خارج الالعاب يمنح وصولا دايما للالعاب

title: Clash of Thrones New Season Reset
label: Clash of Thrones New Season Reset
section: Clash of Thrones — Alliance & Guardian Beast
path: SUGO Knowledgebase — MENA › Games, Events & Clash of Thrones › Clash of Thrones — Alliance & Guardian Beast
titleNorm: function cot season reset clash of thrones new season reset
pathNorm: sugo knowledgebase mena games events clash of thrones clash of thrones alliance guardian beast sugo knowledgebase mena games events clash of thrones clash of thrones alliance guardian beast
bodyNorm: english a clash of thrones level reset happens when a new season starts all users levels reset to 0 for the new season retained assets include heroes guardian beasts zodiac starlight quantity stones silver coins unused keys summon tickets hero summon tickets alliance membership and member relationships season reset effects may include reset activated zodiac progress while keeping starlight quantity main city level reset with season resource compensation after daily login according to last season s main city level city defense facilities cleared and converted into resource compensation chest levels and equipment rarity reset expedition spring level and unused spring water cleared expedition stages reset ladder and power rankings reset limited gift pack purchase eligibility reset daily check in progress reset with new rewards daily and weekly mission progress reset s3 kingdom war points cleared beast hunt data cleared and ladder challenge tickets cross server pk tickets cleared during season settlement full reset details can be checked through the in game help or question mark icon it s because a new season started all users levels have been reset to 0 for the new season however heroes guardian beasts starlights stones silver coins and keys have been retained users can check the new season announcement in the in game mail for more details asset handling rules for the new season zodiac starlight starlight quantity will be fully retained activated zodiac progress will be reset

bodyNorm: answer to verify account ownership and continue reviewing the request the customer must answer all security questions in one message and in the same order the required information includes the id phone model with a screenshot from phone settings linked phone or email registration date last login date and the target or recharge proof depending on whether the user is a host or supporter ticket welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing to verify account ownership and continue reviewing your request please answer the following security questions in one message only in the same order shown below with each answer on a separate line id phone model used on the account please attach a screenshot from the phone settings showing the device model clearly phone or email linked to the account if you want to change the phone please provide both the old number and the new number account registration date on sugo last time the account was logged in target for the current month and the previous month if you are a host please provide the target for the current month and the previous month if you are a supporter please send the latest two recharge invoices the invoices must be confirmed through the payment method and must include the transaction number if the recharge was made through a recharge agent please send a screenshot of the conversation between you and the agent inside the sugo app important note all questions must be answered in order and in

bodyNorm: answer please refresh the app and upload the app log by following these steps go to settings from the profile code page select about sugo tap upload app log and wait until the upload is complete close the app completely restart your phone log out of the app then login again if the issue continues after completing these steps please send a video showing the message or issue that appears and make sure your id is visible in the video ticket welcome to the sugo family we sincerely apologize for the issue you are experiencing please refresh the app and upload the app log by following these steps go to settings from the profile code page select about sugo tap upload app log and wait until the upload is complete close the app completely restart your phone log out of the app then login again if the issue continues after completing these steps please send a video showing the message or issue that appears and make sure your id is visible in the video we once again sincerely apologize for the inconvenience we have caused and we truly thank you for your patience and understanding we wish you a happy and successful day sugo customer service team الاجابه ممكن تقوم بعمل الخطوه التنشيطيه و تتابع معنا مره اخري من خلال الخطوات التاليه الاعدادات ثم حول sugo ثم الضغط علي تحميل السجل وانتظار التحميل واغلاق البرنامج وعمل restart للهاتف وعمل تسجيل خروج ودخول مره اخري للبرنامج واذا كنت تواجه نفس المشكله قم بارسال فيديو يوضح الرساله التي تظهر لك، واظهر رقم حسابك في الفيديو ايضا التذكره مرحبا بك في
